treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted of royal bullion reserves, war gains, customs income, and mobilizable temple-court financial resources. Immediately available liquid reserves were limited, but additional resources could be raised quickly through temples, merchants, and local elites.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏重维持灌溉农业、保障寺庙与王权象征工程、并通过适度商税支持海洋贸易；在稳定时期力求小幅盈余，以应对战争和地方叛乱。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized sustaining irrigated agriculture, funding temples and royal prestige works, and supporting maritime trade through moderate customs. In stable times the state aimed for a modest surplus to prepare for war and local unrest.

description.zh: 帝国军力主体，由长矛兵、弓箭手、持盾步兵与地方征集兵组成，适合围城、守备与区域作战。
description.en: The core of imperial manpower, composed of spearmen, archers, shield-bearing infantry, and locally levied troops, suitable for sieges, garrisoning, and regional warfare.

description.zh: 骑兵数量相对有限，部分依赖进口战马和盟友供给，主要用于快速突击、追击与指挥护卫。
description.en: Cavalry numbers were relatively limited, relying partly on imported horses and allied supply, and were mainly used for rapid assaults, pursuit, and command escort.

description.zh: 战象为南印度王权象征与战场冲击力量，常用于突破阵线、威慑敌军和仪式性展示。
description.en: War elephants served as both symbols of South Indian kingship and battlefield shock forces, used to break formations, intimidate enemies, and display royal power.

description.zh: 维持沿海控制、护航商船、投送兵力并威慑斯里兰卡与东南亚海域，虽不及十一世纪远征巅峰，但仍具显著区域能力。
description.en: Maintained coastal control, escorted merchant shipping, projected force, and deterred rivals in Sri Lanka and Southeast Asian waters; though no longer at the peak of the eleventh-century expeditions, it remained a significant regional arm.

description.zh: 由地方酋长、附庸王和驻屯单位提供，用于边境防御、镇压叛乱和支援大规模战争。
description.en: Provided by local chiefs, subordinate rulers, and garrison units, these forces handled frontier defense, suppression of revolt, and reinforcement in major campaigns.

commanderInChief.zh: 朱罗皇帝兼最高统帅
commanderInChief.en: The Chola Emperor as supreme commander

technology.zh: 军事技术以复合弓前阶段的弓箭、长矛、剑、盾、攻城器械、甲胄和战象运用为主，海军依赖木制远航船只、季风航海知识与沿岸补给体系。
technology.en: Military technology centered on bows, spears, swords, shields, siege equipment, armor, and elephant warfare, while naval strength relied on wooden seagoing vessels, monsoon navigation knowledge, and coastal supply systems.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自西部曷萨拉与其他卡纳塔克势力、南方潘地亚复兴、斯里兰卡局势反复以及附庸地区离心倾向。对北方伊斯兰势力的直接军事压力在1200年前后尚较遥远。
threats.en: The main threats came from the Hoysalas and other Karnataka powers in the west, the revival of the Pandyas in the south, instability in Sri Lanka, and centrifugal tendencies among subordinate regions. Direct military pressure from northern Islamic powers remained distant around 1200.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

description.zh: 全身钢板铠甲（晚期），防护力顶级
description.en: Full plate steel armor (late period), top-tier protection

description.zh: 拜占庭海战秘密武器，水上不灭之火
description.en: Byzantine naval secret weapon, inextinguishable fire on water

populationDescription.zh: 人口集中于卡维里三角洲及其他灌溉良好的农业区，整体人口稠密度在南印度属于较高水平；农业村落构成社会主体，沿海港市和寺庙都市则是商业与文化核心。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated in the Kaveri delta and other well-irrigated agricultural zones, with one of the higher population densities in South India; agrarian villages formed the social core, while coastal ports and temple cities served as commercial and cultural hubs.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为王室、王族、婆罗门与军事贵族；中层包括地主农民、寺庙管理者、商人公会、手工业者；下层为普通佃农、无地劳动者、服务群体与受社会歧视的边缘社群。
socialClasses.en: The upper strata included the royal house, royal kin, Brahmins, and military nobles; the middle layers comprised landed peasants, temple managers, merchant guilds, and artisans; the lower strata included ordinary tenants, landless laborers, service groups, and socially stigmatized marginal communities.

allies.zh: 与部分南印度附庸、港口商人公会、若干斯里兰卡和东南亚贸易伙伴保持务实合作；同宋朝商贸联系尤为重要。
allies.en: The empire maintained pragmatic cooperation with subordinate South Indian rulers, port merchant guilds, and some Sri Lankan and Southeast Asian trade partners; commercial ties with Song China were especially important.

enemies.zh: 主要对手是潘地亚王国、曷萨拉王国及若干反叛附庸势力；在海上则需提防斯里兰卡政治反复与东南亚航线竞争。
enemies.en: Its chief rivals were the Pandya kingdom, the Hoysala kingdom, and various rebellious subordinate powers; at sea it had to watch instability in Sri Lanka and competition along Southeast Asian routes.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以控制南印度核心区、维持斯里兰卡影响力、保护海上贸易通道、扶植商人公会海外活动并通过战争与册封维持地区霸权为主。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on controlling the South Indian core, preserving influence in Sri Lanka, protecting maritime trade routes, supporting overseas activity by merchant guilds, and maintaining regional hegemony through warfare and investiture.

era.zh: 十字军时代

keyInnovations.zh: 成熟的大型灌溉水利体系、巨型石构寺庙工程、失蜡法青铜铸造、碑铭财政管理、海上季风航行与港市贸易组织是这一时期的关键技术与制度优势。
keyInnovations.en: Mature large-scale irrigation systems, monumental stone temple engineering, lost-wax bronze casting, inscription-based fiscal administration, monsoon seafaring, and port-city trade organization were the key technological and institutional strengths of the period.

strengths.zh: 朱罗帝国拥有高产农业核心区、成熟地方治理、强大的寺庙财政网络、活跃海洋贸易和深厚文化合法性，因此在1200年前后仍是南印度最重要的强权之一。
strengths.en: The Chola Empire possessed a productive agrarian core, mature local governance, a powerful temple-fiscal network, active maritime commerce, and deep cultural legitimacy, making it one of the foremost powers in South India around 1200.

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点在于对地方精英与附庸忠诚依赖较大，骑兵能力相对不足，长期战争会削弱财政和边疆控制，而潘地亚与曷萨拉的上升正在侵蚀朱罗霸权。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses lay in heavy reliance on local elites and subordinate loyalty, relatively limited cavalry capacity, and the fiscal and political strain of prolonged war, while the rise of the Pandyas and Hoysalas was eroding Chola hegemony.

outlook.zh: 短期内帝国仍然稳定并具强大影响力，拘罗通迦三世时期可望恢复与展示王朝声威；但从更长时段看，南印度多强竞争格局将使朱罗难以永久维持此前的单极优势。
outlook.en: In the short term the empire remained stable and highly influential, and under Kulothunga III could still revive and display dynastic prestige; over the longer term, however, South India's increasingly multipolar competition would make it difficult to preserve its earlier unchallenged dominance.

description.zh: 南印度海上与寺庙国家传统的核心强权，仍保持显著区域影响。
description.en: The principal power of South India's maritime and temple-state tradition, still maintaining major regional influence.

governmentForm.zh: 印度教君主制，具有高度地方分封与王室中心权威并存的区域王国
governmentForm.en: A Hindu monarchy combining strong royal authority with substantial local landed and feudatory administration

socialStructure.zh: 社会以婆罗门、刹帝利与军事贵族、寺庙机构、城镇商人、手工业者、农民与部族社群构成，种姓秩序与地方习惯法并行，寺庙网络在社会整合中极为重要。
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of Brahmins, Kshatriya and military elites, temple institutions, urban merchants, artisans, peasants, and tribal communities; caste hierarchy coexisted with local custom, and temple networks played a central integrative role.

rulingClass.zh: 东恒伽王室、王族姻亲、军政大臣、婆罗门受赐地主、地方封臣与寺庙管理精英
rulingClass.en: The Eastern Ganga royal house, related nobles, military-administrative ministers, Brahmin landholders, local feudatories, and temple managerial elites

succession.zh: 世袭君主制，通常由王族男性继承，王位确认依赖宫廷、军政精英与宗教合法性的共同支持
succession.en: Hereditary monarchy, usually passing through the male royal line, with succession reinforced by court elites, military backing, and religious legitimacy

structure.zh: 王权核心围绕国王、王室秘书机构、军事统帅、财政征收体系与地方总督运作；下层由省、县、村及受封领地组成，许多地区由附庸首领或受命官员治理。
structure.en: The state was centered on the king, royal secretariat, military command, fiscal collection system, and provincial authorities; below them stood provinces, districts, villages, and landed assignments, with many areas governed by feudatory chiefs or appointed officials.

function.zh: 起草诏令、保存铜板文书、管理印玺、记录赐地与外交往来
function.en: Drafted royal orders, preserved copper-plate charters, managed seals, and recorded grants and diplomatic correspondence

function.zh: 评估耕地、征收田赋、监控港税、盐税与附加劳役义务
function.en: Assessed cultivated land, collected agrarian revenue, and supervised port duties, salt taxes, and corvée obligations

function.zh: 统筹常备军、封臣兵役、象军调度、沿海与河道防御
function.en: Coordinated the standing forces, feudatory levies, elephant corps, and coastal and riverine defenses

function.zh: 监管王室祭祀、寺庙赐地、僧侣与婆罗门特权及大型建筑工程
function.en: Oversaw royal ritual, temple endowments, clerical and Brahmin privileges, and major sacred construction projects

name.en: Provincial Administration and Public Order Department

function.zh: 联系地方长官、处理治安、道路、水利及基层争讼事务
function.en: Liaised with local governors, handled security, roads, irrigation, and routine local disputes

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由省级与县级官员、村社首领、封臣以及寺庙地主共同承担；王权在核心平原区较强，在边缘森林与部族地带更多依赖间接统治。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was shared by provincial and district officers, village headmen, feudatories, and temple landholders; royal control was stronger in the core plains and more indirect in forest and tribal frontier zones.

legalSystem.zh: 法律基础为王令、达摩沙斯特拉传统、地方习惯与寺庙法权；土地、婚姻、继承与种姓事务常由婆罗门法学者、村社与地方官共同裁断。
legalSystem.en: Law rested on royal decree, Dharmashastra tradition, local custom, and temple authority; land, marriage, inheritance, and caste matters were often adjudicated jointly by Brahmin jurists, village bodies, and local officials.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政以田赋为主，并辅以港口关税、市场税、盐税、渔业与森林收益、贡赋及劳役；寺庙和婆罗门受赐地常享有部分或全部免税。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied chiefly on land revenue, supplemented by port customs, market dues, salt taxes, fisheries and forest income, tribute, and labor service; temple and Brahmin grants often enjoyed partial or total exemptions.

religion.zh: 以印度教为主，尤其是毗湿奴—阇伽那特信仰、湿婆崇拜与夏克提传统并存；佛教影响已衰退但仍有余脉，部族信仰也被逐步纳入区域宗教体系。
religion.en: Religion was predominantly Hindu, especially Vaishnava-Jagannath devotion alongside Shaiva and Shakta traditions; Buddhism had declined but left traces, while tribal cults were increasingly absorbed into the regional religious order.

philosophy.zh: 思想上以婆罗门经典学、虔信传统、王权神授观念和寺庙仪式宇宙观为主，强调国王作为神圣秩序守护者的角色。
philosophy.en: Intellectual life centered on Brahmanical learning, devotional religion, divine kingship, and temple ritual cosmology, emphasizing the king as protector of sacred order.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用早期奥里亚文字及梵文书写传统，官方铭文多见于梵文，也逐渐出现地方语言书写。
writingSystem.en: Writing mainly used early Odia script and the Sanskrit scribal tradition; official inscriptions were often in Sanskrit, though regional language writing was increasingly visible.

culturalAchievements.zh: 东恒伽时期推动了奥里萨区域文化的成熟，发展出独特的寺庙建筑、石雕、宗教仪式、土地捐献铭文传统与海滨朝圣文化；此时期正处于后来科纳克与普里辉煌建筑传统的奠基阶段。
culturalAchievements.en: The Eastern Ganga period fostered the maturation of a distinct Odishan regional culture, developing temple architecture, stone sculpture, ritual traditions, land-grant epigraphy, and coastal pilgrimage culture; this era laid the foundations for the later monumental achievements at Puri and Konark.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系印度-雅利安语支，以早期奥里亚语与梵语为主，另有部族语言分布于内陆山区
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Indo-Aryan branch, with early Odia and Sanskrit predominant, alongside tribal languages in the inland highlands

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以稻作农业为核心，结合三角洲灌溉、寺庙土地经营、区域手工业与海上贸易。就东印度地区而言，王国经济规模较大且稳定，但远不及同时期南宋或北印度最富庶的跨区域市场总量。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was centered on rice agriculture, supported by delta irrigation, temple land management, regional crafts, and maritime trade. By eastern Indian standards it was large and stable, though far below the aggregate wealth of Song China or the richest transregional markets of the subcontinent.

mainIndustries.zh: 水稻农业、棉织与地方纺织、盐业、造船与海运、石雕与建筑、金属工艺、林产与象牙相关贸易
mainIndustries.en: Rice agriculture, cotton weaving and regional textiles, salt production, shipbuilding and seaborne transport, stone carving and construction, metalwork, and forest and ivory-related trade

tradeGoods.zh: 大米、盐、纺织品、胡椒与香料转口品、木材、漆料、贝壳制品、象、宝石、金属器与宗教用品
tradeGoods.en: Rice, salt, textiles, pepper and re-exported spices, timber, lac, shell products, elephants, gemstones, metal goods, and religious articles

name.zh: 达姆与金银衡量货币并用

householdWealth.zh: 普通农户财富主要表现为耕牛、粮食储备、农具与村社土地使用权；城市商人、寺庙与地主家族积累了更高的金银、珠宝与地产财富。
householdWealth.en: Ordinary household wealth consisted mainly of cattle, grain reserves, tools, and access to village land; urban merchants, temples, and landed families accumulated larger holdings in bullion, jewelry, and real estate.

economicSystem.zh: 以农业剩余、王室征收、寺庙再分配和区域市场交换构成的前近代混合经济；港口贸易与内陆封建地租并存。
economicSystem.en: A premodern mixed economy built on agrarian surplus, royal extraction, temple redistribution, and regional market exchange; maritime commerce coexisted with inland feudal-style rent networks.

source.en: Tribute from feudatories and provincial remittances

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库由王室金银、珠宝、战争储备、贡赋积存及可动用的寺庙合作资源构成；稳定时期财政尚有结余，但大规模建寺或长期战争会迅速消耗现金储备。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted of royal bullion, jewels, war reserves, accumulated tribute, and resources available through temple cooperation; finances ran a modest surplus in stable times, but large temple projects or prolonged war could quickly drain liquid reserves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏保守，依靠农业税基与贸易税维持稳定，倾向通过赐地与宗教赞助换取忠诚，而非建立高度货币化的集中财政国家。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was conservative, relying on an agrarian tax base and trade duties for stability, and preferring land grants and religious patronage to secure loyalty rather than building a highly monetized centralized fiscal state.

description.zh: 由持矛、弓箭、剑盾步兵构成，是战争中的主体兵力，既有常备兵也有地方征召兵。
description.en: Composed of spearmen, archers, and sword-and-shield infantry; it formed the bulk of wartime forces and included both standing troops and locally levied men.

description.zh: 数量相对有限，依赖进口战马与贵族武士，主要用于快速机动、追击与侧翼作战。
description.en: Relatively limited in number, relying on imported horses and noble warriors, and used mainly for mobility, pursuit, and flank action.

description.zh: 象军为王权象征与突击力量，适于震慑敌军、冲击阵线和提升统帅威望，但维护成本高昂。
description.en: The elephant corps served as both a symbol of royal power and a shock arm, useful for intimidating enemies, breaking lines, and enhancing commander prestige, though costly to maintain.

description.zh: 由地方首领、封臣和边区武装提供，战时集结，质量不一，但对维持大规模战役十分重要。
description.en: Provided by local chiefs, feudatories, and frontier militias, these forces were assembled in wartime and varied in quality but were essential for sustaining large campaigns.

description.zh: 主要负责海岸巡防、河口运输、登陆支援与护航，而非远洋决战舰队。
description.en: Primarily responsible for coastal patrol, estuarine transport, landing support, and escort duties rather than blue-water fleet battles.

commanderInChief.zh: 阿南伽毗摩三世及其大将军
commanderInChief.en: Anangabhima III and his chief generals

technology.zh: 军备以印度中世纪传统为主，包括复合或强化弓、长矛、刀剑、甲衣、战象装备、攻城器械和木制船只；海军与骑兵技术不及南印度顶尖海上强国或中亚骑射传统。
technology.en: Military technology was broadly typical of medieval India, including strengthened bows, spears, swords, armor, elephant equipment, siege devices, and wooden vessels; naval and cavalry sophistication did not equal the leading South Indian maritime powers or Central Asian mounted traditions.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自西方和西北方向的北印度伊斯兰扩张势力、与南方朱罗及其他德干诸国的沿海竞争，以及边区部族和附庸不稳。
threats.en: Primary threats came from Islamic expansion in northern India to the west and northwest, coastal competition with the Cholas and other Deccan powers to the south, and instability among frontier tribes and feudatories.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气尚可，常规水平
description.en: Adequate morale, average cohesion

description.zh: 绞盘上弦重弩，可破重甲
description.en: Windlass-drawn heavy crossbow capable of piercing heavy armor

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 蒙古骑兵标志武器，射程远精度高
description.en: Signature Mongol cavalry weapon with great range and accuracy

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中于马汉迪三角洲、沿海平原和河谷农业区，山区与森林地带人口较稀疏，包含大量部族社群。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated in the Mahanadi delta, coastal plains, and riverine agricultural zones, while hill and forest regions were more thinly settled and included many tribal communities.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为王室、婆罗门、军事贵族与大地主；中层为商人、书记、手工业者与寺庙服务群体；下层为农民、佃户、劳役者及边区部族人口。
socialClasses.en: The upper strata consisted of the royal family, Brahmins, military nobles, and major landholders; the middle strata included merchants, scribes, artisans, and temple-serving groups; the lower strata were peasants, tenants, laborers, and frontier tribal populations.

allies.zh: 无持久固定盟友，更多依赖与南印度、德干及孟加拉周边政权之间的阶段性和约、婚姻联系与共同利益安排。
allies.en: There were no permanent fixed allies; diplomacy relied more on temporary agreements, marriage ties, and converging interests with neighboring South Indian, Deccan, and Bengal polities.

enemies.zh: 潜在敌对者包括孟加拉方向的扩张势力、德干沿海竞争者以及任何试图控制东印度贸易和边区附庸的邻国。
enemies.en: Potential enemies included expansionist powers in Bengal, Deccan coastal rivals, and any neighboring state seeking to dominate eastern Indian trade or frontier feudatories.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策重在维持东海岸优势、保护港口贸易、通过宗教声望与王室婚姻巩固合法性，并在北印度局势变化中保持战略弹性。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on maintaining dominance along the eastern coast, protecting port commerce, strengthening legitimacy through religious prestige and royal marriages, and preserving strategic flexibility amid changing conditions in northern India.

era.zh: 中世纪盛期，十字军时代
era.en: High Middle Ages, Age of Crusades

keyInnovations.zh: 关键能力在于石造寺庙工程、区域水利管理、铜板文书体系、海岸与河口航运、战象军事组织以及成熟的雕刻建筑工艺。
keyInnovations.en: Key capabilities included stone temple engineering, regional irrigation management, copper-plate charter administration, coastal and estuarine navigation, organized elephant warfare, and advanced sculptural building techniques.

strengths.zh: 王朝统治稳定、农业基础扎实、海岸贸易有利、宗教与文化凝聚力强，且东恒伽王朝具备较高的地方整合能力。
strengths.en: The kingdom benefited from stable dynastic rule, a solid agrarian base, advantageous coastal trade, strong religious-cultural cohesion, and the Eastern Ganga dynasty’s significant capacity for regional integration.

weaknesses.zh: 中央集权有限，财政对农业与地方合作依赖很深，骑兵相对薄弱，边区控制不均，若遭遇持续性的北方军事压力则易受挑战。
weaknesses.en: Centralization remained limited, finances depended heavily on agriculture and local cooperation, cavalry was comparatively weak, frontier control was uneven, and sustained military pressure from the north could prove difficult to resist.

outlook.zh: 到1200年前后，王国前景总体稳健，并有望继续巩固奥里萨地区的政治与文化核心地位；若能有效应对孟加拉与北印度的新兴军事势力，其区域影响力仍可进一步扩大。
outlook.en: Around 1200 CE, the kingdom’s outlook was broadly solid, with good prospects for further consolidating Odisha as a political and cultural core; if it could manage emerging military pressures from Bengal and northern India, its regional influence could continue to expand.

description.zh: 东印度重要王朝，控制孟加拉湾沿岸并发展强烈的区域文化传统。
description.en: A major eastern Indian dynasty controlling the Bay of Bengal coast and fostering a strong regional culture.

name.zh: 卡纳塔克地区王国（霍伊萨拉王国）

governmentForm.zh: 以王权为核心、依靠地方封臣与寺庙机构运作的印度教君主制
governmentForm.en: A Hindu monarchy centered on royal authority and administered through local feudatories and temple institutions

socialStructure.zh: 社会以种姓、土地控制与宗教机构为核心，上层由王族、军事贵族、婆罗门与富裕地主构成，中层包括商人、手工业者与寺庙雇员，下层为农民、牧民、劳役民与边缘部族社群。
socialStructure.en: Society was structured around caste, land control, and religious institutions. The upper ranks consisted of the royal house, military nobility, Brahmins, and wealthy landholders; the middle ranks included merchants, artisans, and temple employees; the lower ranks were made up of cultivators, pastoralists, laboring groups, and marginal tribal communities.

rulingClass.zh: 霍伊萨拉王室、地方那雅迦与达南那雅迦等军事贵族、婆罗门授地阶层，以及掌管大寺庙与税收的地方精英
rulingClass.en: The Hoysala royal family, military nobles such as nayakas and dandanayakas, Brahmin land grantees, and local elites who controlled major temples and revenue

succession.zh: 王位通常按王朝世袭传承，多在王族男性成员间继承，但也会通过共治、指定继承人与宫廷支持来确保平稳交接。
succession.en: The throne generally passed hereditarily within the dynasty, usually among male members of the royal family, though co-rule, nominated heirs, and court backing were often used to secure smooth succession.

structure.zh: 中央宫廷设于多罗娑牟陀罗，由国王、王后、王储、军政大臣与书记官体系组成；地方划分为纳杜、维沙耶与村社等层级，依赖封臣、地方首领、寺庙机构和村社议会共同治理。
structure.en: The central court at Dwarasamudra was composed of the king, queen, crown prince, military and civil ministers, and a scribal establishment. The countryside was divided into units such as nadus, vishayas, and villages, governed jointly through feudatories, local chiefs, temple institutions, and village assemblies.

function.zh: 起草诏令、保存铭文记录、登记授地与官职任命，并协调中央与地方之间的文书往来。
function.en: Drafted royal orders, maintained inscriptional records, registered land grants and appointments, and coordinated written communications between center and provinces.

function.zh: 丈量土地、评估农产、征收地税、管理王室地产与监督地方税额上缴。
function.en: Measured land, assessed agricultural output, collected land revenue, managed crown estates, and supervised provincial remittances.

function.zh: 统筹常备军、封臣兵役、驻军、边防、马匹与象队调度，并安排征讨与防务。
function.en: Oversaw the standing army, feudatory levies, garrisons, frontier defense, and the deployment of cavalry and elephants for campaigns and security.

function.zh: 管理宫廷供给、王室财产、典礼、外交接待与宗教赞助事务。
function.en: Managed palace provisions, royal property, court ritual, diplomatic receptions, and religious patronage.

function.zh: 修建水库、渠道、道路、桥梁、城防以及支持寺庙与市镇建筑工程。
function.en: Built reservoirs, canals, roads, bridges, fortifications, and supported temple and town construction.

function.zh: 处理诉讼、核验地方裁断、监督封臣忠诚，并在争议地区执行王命。
function.en: Handled litigation, reviewed local judgments, monitored feudatory loyalty, and enforced royal authority in disputed regions.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政兼具王朝控制与地方自治色彩。较大的区域由王室任命或认可的总督、军政官与封臣管理，村社则由村长、会众与地权群体处理日常事务。寺庙常兼具财政、仓储、雇工与调解功能，是重要的基层治理节点。
localAdmin.en: Local administration combined dynastic oversight with substantial local autonomy. Larger districts were managed by royal appointees, military governors, and feudatories, while village headmen, assemblies, and landed groups handled daily affairs. Temples also functioned as fiscal, storage, labor, and arbitration centers, making them key nodes of grassroots governance.

legalSystem.zh: 法律秩序建立在王命、达摩法传统、地方习惯法、行会规则与寺庙仲裁之上。土地、灌溉、税负、继承和寺产争端常由地方会议先行处理，重大案件再上达王廷或军政官。
legalSystem.en: The legal order rested on royal command, dharmashastra traditions, local customary law, guild rules, and temple arbitration. Disputes over land, irrigation, taxation, inheritance, and temple property were often handled first in local assemblies before being escalated to the royal court or military administrators.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政以农业地税为主，并辅以灌溉税、商税、市场税、过路税、手工业税与贡赋。部分税收以实物征纳，如稻谷、油料、牲畜和纺织品；交通节点与城镇则更多征收货币税。寺庙授地与婆罗门村常享有减免。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue rested primarily on agricultural land tax, supplemented by irrigation dues, commercial taxes, market tolls, transit duties, artisan levies, and tribute. Some taxes were collected in kind, such as rice, oilseeds, livestock, and textiles, while transport corridors and towns more often paid in cash. Temple lands and Brahmin settlements often enjoyed exemptions.

religion.zh: 王国以印度教为主，毗湿奴派、湿婆派与耆那教并存。毗湿奴伐弹那在位时尤其著名于赞助毗湿奴派寺庙，但王朝总体上延续多宗教赞助传统。
religion.en: The kingdom was predominantly Hindu, with Vaishnavism, Shaivism, and Jainism coexisting. Vishnuvardhana was especially noted for patronizing Vaishnava temples, though the dynasty broadly maintained a tradition of multi-religious patronage.

philosophy.zh: 思想生活受婆罗门教经典、南印度奉爱运动、吠檀多传统以及耆那学术影响。宫廷与寺庙是神学辩论、诗歌创作和王权合法性阐释的重要场域。
philosophy.en: Intellectual life was shaped by Brahmanical learning, the South Indian bhakti movement, Vedantic traditions, and Jain scholarship. Court and temple circles served as major venues for theological debate, poetry, and the articulation of royal legitimacy.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用古卡纳达文与梵文书写，铭文多见于石刻和铜板，行政、宗教和赞颂文本常双语并用。
writingSystem.en: Old Kannada and Sanskrit were the principal written languages. Inscriptions commonly appeared on stone and copper plates, and administrative, religious, and eulogistic texts were often bilingual.

culturalAchievements.zh: 霍伊萨拉时期最突出的文化成就是精雕细刻的皂石寺庙建筑，如贝鲁尔和哈勒比德一带的寺院群；同时宫廷支持卡纳达语文学、梵文颂诗、青铜与石雕艺术、舞蹈音乐传统以及大型水利建设。
culturalAchievements.en: The most distinctive cultural achievement of the Hoysala period was its intricately carved soapstone temple architecture, exemplified by temple complexes at Belur and around Halebidu. The court also supported Kannada literature, Sanskrit panegyrics, bronze and stone sculpture, performance traditions, and major hydraulic works.

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属达罗毗荼语系（卡纳达语），上层宗教与学术语言广泛使用印欧语系的梵语
languageFamily.en: The principal spoken language belonged to the Dravidian family (Kannada), while the Indo-European language Sanskrit was widely used in elite religious and scholarly contexts

gdpDescription.zh: 就1200年前后的南印度区域国家而言，霍伊萨拉经济处于较高发展水平。其基础是稻作、旱地杂粮、椰枣与园圃农业，辅以牲畜、纺织、金属加工、采石和寺庙驱动的再分配体系。虽不如同时代泰米尔沿海海贸强国那样面向远洋，但凭借内陆控制力、通往西海岸港口的交通线与富庶农业腹地，经济活力强劲。
gdpDescription.en: By the standards of regional South Indian states around 1200, the Hoysala economy was highly developed. Its foundation lay in wet-rice cultivation, dry grains, garden crops, livestock, textiles, metalworking, quarrying, and temple-centered redistribution. Though less maritime than the great Tamil coastal powers, it possessed strong economic vitality through inland control, routes to west-coast ports, and a prosperous agrarian hinterland.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、灌溉农业、牲畜饲养、棉纺织、石材雕刻、金属加工、珠宝制作、寺庙建筑、区域贸易与马匹转运
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, irrigated farming, livestock raising, cotton textiles, stone carving, metalworking, jewelry production, temple construction, regional trade, and horse redistribution

tradeGoods.zh: 稻米、胡椒、豆类、芝麻、酥油、棉布、雕刻石材制品、檀香、象牙制品、铁器、贵金属饰品，以及自西海岸输入的马匹和奢侈品
tradeGoods.en: Rice, pepper, pulses, sesame, ghee, cotton cloth, carved stone goods, sandalwood, ivory products, ironware, precious metal ornaments, and horses and luxury items imported through the west coast

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异很大。王室、寺庙与大地主控制大量土地、金银器和牲畜；一般农户主要以耕地使用权、粮食储备、牛只与基本器具为财富形式；城市商人与匠人则积累货币、库存和房产。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied greatly. The royal family, temples, and major landholders controlled extensive land, precious metal objects, and livestock; ordinary cultivators held wealth mainly in land-use rights, grain reserves, cattle, and tools; urban merchants and artisans accumulated cash, inventories, and property.

economicSystem.zh: 经济体系是农业剩余支撑下的王权—寺庙—地方精英混合体。土地授予、实物税、货币商税、行会活动与宗教机构再分配彼此交织，形成一种部分货币化但仍以土地与赋役关系为核心的前近代经济。
economicSystem.en: The economic system was a royal-temple-local elite hybrid built on agrarian surplus. Land grants, in-kind taxation, monetized trade duties, guild activity, and religious redistribution were interwoven, producing a partially monetized premodern economy still centered on land and obligations.

source.en: Tribute from feudatories and war gains

source.zh: 王室地产与矿冶手工业收入

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库由贵金属、铸币、珠宝、战利品、牲畜账目和储粮价值共同构成。相当部分财富分散在寺庙库藏、地方要塞和王室仓储中，而非完全集中于首都。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted of precious metals, coin, jewels, war booty, livestock accounts, and the value of grain stores. A significant portion of wealth was dispersed among temple treasuries, provincial forts, and royal granaries rather than concentrated solely in the capital.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏重维持军事实力、修建寺庙与水利、并通过赐地和减税换取地方精英与宗教机构支持。繁荣时期可保持小幅盈余，但战争扩张会迅速抬高支出。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized sustaining military strength, building temples and irrigation works, and securing support from local elites and religious institutions through grants and tax remissions. In prosperous years the kingdom could maintain a modest surplus, but military expansion rapidly increased expenditure.

description.zh: 人数最多，由持矛、刀盾、弓箭和轻装部队组成，来源包括王室直属兵、地方征发兵和封臣部队。
description.en: The largest arm, composed of spearmen, sword-and-shield troops, archers, and light infantry drawn from royal forces, local levies, and feudatory contingents.

description.zh: 骑兵是机动核心，但优质战马高度依赖西海岸贸易输入，因此维持成本较高，主要用于突击、追击和支援封臣作战。
description.en: Cavalry formed the mobile core of the army, but quality warhorses depended heavily on imports through west-coast trade, making the arm expensive to sustain. It was used for shock action, pursuit, and support of feudatory operations.

description.zh: 战象用于冲击、破阵、威慑与王权象征，常伴有护卫步兵，是南印度战争中的精锐与 prestige force。
description.en: War elephants were used for shock, line-breaking, intimidation, and royal display. Usually supported by protective infantry, they were an elite and prestigious component of South Indian warfare.

description.zh: 驻防于要塞、城市和交通节点，负责守城、护税、维持秩序和在边境地区快速集结。
description.en: Stationed in forts, towns, and transport nodes, they were responsible for defense, protection of revenue, maintaining order, and rapid mobilization in frontier districts.

commanderInChief.zh: 毗湿奴伐弹那国王
commanderInChief.en: King Vishnuvardhana

technology.zh: 军事技术以铁制近战武器、复合或竹木弓、甲胄、攻城器械、象具与石木要塞工事为主。其作战效能更多依赖地方动员、骑象协同、地形熟悉和封臣网络，而非突破性的技术创新。
technology.en: Military technology relied on iron melee weapons, bows of composite or bamboo construction, armor, siege devices, elephant equipment, and stone-and-timber fortifications. Its effectiveness depended more on local mobilization, cavalry-elephant coordination, terrain familiarity, and feudatory networks than on any singular technological breakthrough.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自南方与东南方向的朱罗势力、东部地区竞争王朝以及德干高地其他卡纳塔克与安得拉政权。内部则需防范封臣坐大、边区叛离和军费过重导致的财政紧张。
threats.en: The main threats came from Chola power to the south and southeast, rival dynasties in the east, and other Karnataka and Deccan polities. Internally, the kingdom had to guard against overmighty feudatories, frontier defections, and fiscal strain from sustained campaigning.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

description.zh: 蒙古骑兵标志武器，射程远精度高
description.en: Signature Mongol cavalry weapon with great range and accuracy

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要分布在卡纳塔克南部高原、河谷灌溉区和若干市场城镇周边。整体以农村人口为主，但受益于寺庙经济、区域贸易与王朝扩张，城镇网络正在增强。
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated in the southern Karnataka plateau, irrigated river valleys, and around market towns. Society remained overwhelmingly rural, but urban networks were strengthening thanks to temple economies, regional trade, and dynastic expansion.

name.zh: 斯里兰伽帕特纳地区聚落
班加罗尔地区早期聚落

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层大体可分为王室与军事贵族、婆罗门与寺庙精英、商人与行会、城市工匠、自由农民、佃作农与劳役群体，以及森林与边地部族社群。种姓区分、职业传承和土地占有是界定身份的重要标准。
socialClasses.en: Social strata broadly included the royal house and military nobility, Brahmins and temple elites, merchants and guilds, urban artisans, free cultivators, tenant farmers and laboring groups, and forest and frontier tribal communities. Caste distinctions, occupational inheritance, and landholding were key markers of status.

allies.zh: 霍伊萨拉王国通常通过婚姻、封臣关系与临时军事合作维系周边盟友，与部分地方首领及反朱罗势力保持合作；同时也会与西海岸商人网络和宗教机构建立稳固联系。
allies.en: The Hoysala kingdom typically maintained allies through marriage ties, feudatory relations, and temporary military cooperation, working with certain local chiefs and anti-Chola forces. It also cultivated strong links with west-coast merchant networks and religious institutions.

enemies.zh: 最主要的外部对手是泰米尔朱罗王朝；此外在德干和东南方向还与其他地区王朝存在持续竞争与边界冲突。
enemies.en: Its principal external rival was the Tamil Chola dynasty. It also faced ongoing competition and border conflicts with other regional dynasties in the Deccan and southeast.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以扩张卡纳塔克腹地控制、争夺恒河—卡韦里之间战略通道、削弱朱罗影响并获取贸易通路为核心。王朝偏好以军事压力、封臣安置、婚姻联姻和宗教赞助共同推进势力扩张。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on consolidating control over the Karnataka interior, contesting strategic corridors between the Ganga and Kaveri regions, weakening Chola influence, and securing trade routes. The dynasty advanced its influence through a combination of military pressure, feudatory placement, marriage alliances, and religious patronage.

era.zh: 十字军时代

keyInnovations.zh: 关键能力体现在精密皂石雕刻建筑、改良灌溉水库与渠道系统、铜板与石刻行政记录、区域铸币、金属工艺以及适应高原与河谷作战的军事组织。技术整体上属于成熟的中世纪南亚水平。
keyInnovations.en: Key capabilities included refined soapstone temple carving, improved irrigation tanks and canal systems, copper-plate and stone inscriptional administration, regional coinage, metal craftsmanship, and military organization adapted to plateau and riverine warfare. Overall technology stood at a mature medieval South Asian level.

strengths.zh: 王国的优势在于农业基础稳固、地方动员力强、寺庙与王权结合紧密、建筑文化成就卓著，并在卡纳塔克内陆形成不断上升的军事与政治影响力。
strengths.en: The kingdom's strengths lay in its solid agrarian base, strong local mobilization capacity, close integration of temple and royal authority, remarkable architectural culture, and rising military and political influence across inland Karnataka.

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点包括对封臣合作的依赖较深、骑兵战马供应受海上贸易制约、财政容易被持续战争和大规模宗教建筑拖累，而且对远洋贸易的直接控制弱于沿海强国。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included deep dependence on feudatory cooperation, reliance on maritime trade for cavalry horses, vulnerability of finances to prolonged war and monumental religious building, and weaker direct control over overseas commerce than major coastal powers.

outlook.zh: 1200年前后的霍伊萨拉王国前景总体乐观。若能继续压制朱罗势力、整合地方封臣并保持税收与灌溉体系稳定，王朝有望进一步成长为南印度主要强权；但若边疆战事过多或继承不稳，其扩张成果也可能迅速受挫。
outlook.en: The outlook for the Hoysala kingdom around 1200 was broadly favorable. If it could continue to check Chola power, integrate local feudatories, and keep revenue and irrigation systems stable, it had strong prospects of becoming one of the principal powers of South India. However, excessive frontier warfare or unstable succession could quickly undermine its gains.

description.zh: 南印度内陆兴起中的强国，以寺庙建筑和军事扩张著称。
description.en: A rising inland South Indian power noted for temple architecture and military expansion.

governmentForm.zh: 印度中部地区性的君主制王国，采用以王室、封臣贵族与婆罗门文官共同支撑的分层统治结构
governmentForm.en: A regional monarchy in central India with a layered governing structure supported jointly by the royal house, feudatory nobles, and Brahmin officials

socialStructure.zh: 社会以种姓秩序、宗族网络与地方封建关系为基础，王室之下有拉其普特武士贵族、婆罗门祭司与书记官、城镇商人行会、农民村社及从事服务与劳役的较低等级群体
socialStructure.en: Society rested on caste hierarchy, kinship networks, and local feudal ties; beneath the royal court stood Rajput warrior nobles, Brahmin ritual specialists and scribal officials, urban merchant guilds, peasant village communities, and lower-status service and laboring groups

rulingClass.zh: 波罗摩罗王室、附庸拉其普特首领、婆罗门高级官员与掌握寺庙土地的宗教精英
rulingClass.en: The Paramara royal family, feudatory Rajput chiefs, senior Brahmin officials, and religious elites controlling temple lands

succession.zh: 以父系世袭为主，通常由王族男性继承王位，但在实际操作中也受宫廷支持、军事实力与宗族协商影响
succession.en: Primarily patrilineal hereditary succession, usually passing to a male member of the royal line, though in practice shaped by court support, military strength, and dynastic negotiation

structure.zh: 王国政务以国王为核心，中央宫廷负责财政、军事、司法、宗教赏赐与外交，地方则通过行省式领地、附庸首领、堡寨长官和村社首人进行间接统治
structure.en: Government centered on the king and the royal court, which managed finance, military affairs, justice, religious patronage, and diplomacy, while the countryside was ruled indirectly through provincial estates, feudatory chiefs, fort commanders, and village headmen

function.zh: 起草诏令、保存土地敕赐文书、登记附庸义务并管理王室印玺
function.en: Drafted royal orders, preserved land-grant charters, registered feudatory obligations, and managed the royal seal

function.zh: 征收地租、商税、过境税与附庸贡赋，核查王室领地收入并分配军费与宫廷开支
function.en: Collected land revenue, market dues, transit tolls, and feudatory tribute, audited crown-domain income, and allocated military and court expenditures

function.zh: 调集王室亲军和附庸兵，维护堡垒、军械、战马与边境驻军
function.en: Mobilized royal troops and feudatory contingents, and maintained forts, arsenals, warhorses, and frontier garrisons

function.zh: 处理重大争讼、确认寺庙和婆罗门受赐土地、协调习惯法与王命
function.en: Handled major disputes, confirmed temple and Brahmin land grants, and reconciled customary law with royal authority

function.zh: 监管集市、度量衡、商旅通道、河渡和区域贸易税卡
function.en: Supervised markets, weights and measures, merchant routes, ferries, and regional customs points

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依靠王室直辖领、附庸诸侯、要塞总管和村社自治结合运作。较富庶地区由国王任命的官员配合婆罗门书记和村长征税，边缘地区则更多依附地方首领与军事堡寨控制。
localAdmin.en: Local administration functioned through a combination of crown lands, feudatory lordships, fort governors, and village self-management. In richer districts, royal appointees worked with Brahmin scribes and village headmen to collect revenue, while frontier zones relied more heavily on local chiefs and military strongholds.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以印度教法典传统、王室敕令、地方习惯法和种姓社群仲裁并行。土地、婚姻、继承和宗教事务多依婆罗门法学解释，刑事与叛乱案件则由国王及其将领裁断。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Dharmashastra tradition, royal edicts, local custom, and caste-community arbitration. Matters of land, marriage, inheritance, and religion often followed Brahmin legal interpretation, while criminal offenses and rebellion were judged by the king and his commanders.

taxationSystem.zh: 赋税以农业地租为核心，辅以灌溉税、牧税、手工业课税、商税、市场税、渡口税和附庸贡赋。部分寺庙和婆罗门受赐地享有减免，导致税基在王室直辖地之外较不均衡。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation was centered on agrarian land revenue, supplemented by irrigation dues, pasture taxes, artisan levies, trade duties, market fees, ferry tolls, and tribute from feudatories. Some temple and Brahmin endowments enjoyed exemptions, making the tax base uneven outside direct crown domains.

religion.zh: 以印度教为主，特别崇奉湿婆与毗湿奴，同时耆那教在马尔瓦城镇和商人群体中仍具重要影响；佛教已明显衰落
religion.en: Religion was predominantly Hindu, with strong Shaiva and Vaishnava devotion, while Jainism remained important in Malwa’s towns and merchant circles; Buddhism had largely declined

philosophy.zh: 思想生活以婆罗门经学、王权正统观念、湿婆派与毗檀多传统为主，同时受耆那教伦理与地方宫廷诗学影响
philosophy.en: Intellectual life was shaped by Brahmanical scholasticism, theories of righteous kingship, Shaiva and Vedantic traditions, and also by Jain ethics and regional courtly literary culture

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用梵语与地方俗语书写，文字体系属于婆罗米系的西印度和中印度地方字体，碑铭与官方敕令多用梵语
writingSystem.en: Writing employed Sanskrit and regional vernaculars in western and central Indian scripts derived from Brahmi; inscriptions and formal charters were commonly issued in Sanskrit

culturalAchievements.zh: 波罗摩罗王朝长期以文艺赞助著称。虽最辉煌时期在博阇王时代已过，但至1200年前后，陀罗仍是中印度学术、诗歌、寺庙建筑和铭文文化的重要中心，宫廷继续维护梵语文学传统与地方宗教建筑活动。
culturalAchievements.en: The Paramaras were long renowned for literary and artistic patronage. Although their greatest brilliance had passed with the age of King Bhoja, Dhar around 1200 still remained an important center of central Indian scholarship, poetry, temple architecture, and inscriptional culture, with the court continuing to support Sanskrit literary traditions and regional religious building.

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属印欧语系印度-雅利安语支，宫廷高文化语言为梵语，民间通行中西部印度俗语前身
languageFamily.en: The principal languages belonged to the Indo-European Indo-Aryan branch; Sanskrit served as the high courtly language, while early western and central Indo-Aryan vernaculars were spoken among the population

gdpDescription.zh: 摩腊婆经济以农业为核心，依赖黑棉土地区的谷物、豆类和棉花生产，并受益于连接古吉拉特、拉贾斯坦、北印度与德干高原的陆路商道。其财富水平在印度地区性王国中较高，但远不及南宋或大型伊斯兰商贸帝国。
gdpDescription.en: Malwa’s economy was agrarian at its core, relying on grain, pulses, and cotton from the black-soil zones, while benefiting from overland routes linking Gujarat, Rajasthan, northern India, and the Deccan. Its wealth level was high for a regional Indian kingdom, though far below that of the Southern Song or major Islamic commercial empires.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、棉纺与织造、染色、金属器制作、石材建筑、寺庙经济、区域商贸与马匹贸易中转
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, cotton spinning and weaving, dyeing, metalworking, stone construction, temple-based economic activity, regional commerce, and horse-trade transit

tradeGoods.zh: 棉布、原棉、谷物、豆类、芝麻、糖类制品、染料、金属器、宝石小件、木材、盐与输入战马
tradeGoods.en: Cotton cloth, raw cotton, grain, pulses, sesame, sugar products, dyes, metal goods, small gemstones, timber, salt, and imported warhorses

householdWealth.zh: 大多数家庭财富主要以土地使用权、牲畜、粮食储备、首饰和宗族关系体现。城镇商人与寺庙机构积累的流动财富明显高于一般农户。
householdWealth.en: Most household wealth took the form of land-use rights, livestock, grain reserves, jewelry, and kinship ties. Urban merchants and temple institutions held significantly more movable wealth than ordinary peasant households.

economicSystem.zh: 经济制度属于以农业剩余汲取、封建贡赋、寺庙土地网络与城市行会交易并存的前近代区域市场经济。王权控制关键通道和税卡，但地方首领与宗教机构分享大量经济资源。
economicSystem.en: The economic system was a premodern regional market economy combining agrarian surplus extraction, feudal tribute, temple land networks, and urban guild exchange. The monarchy controlled key routes and customs points, but local chiefs and religious institutions shared much of the economic base.

source.zh: 王室领地、矿冶与其他收入
source.en: Crown estates, mines, and miscellaneous income

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库规模对地区性王国而言较为可观，主要由银币、贵金属器、珠宝、储粮权益和可随时征调的附庸资源构成，但其实际流动性受战争、干旱和贵族忠诚度影响。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was substantial for a regional kingdom, consisting mainly of silver coin, precious metal objects, jewels, grain entitlements, and feudatory resources that could be called upon, though its practical liquidity was affected by war, drought, and noble loyalty.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏保守稳健，在维持军备与王室威望的同时，依靠土地税与商业税维持平衡；稳定时期尽量保持小幅结余，以备对古吉拉特、拉贾斯坦或北方入侵压力作出反应。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was conservative and stability-oriented, maintaining military readiness and royal prestige while balancing revenues through land and trade taxation; in peaceful years the court sought a modest surplus to prepare for pressure from Gujarat, Rajasthan, or northern invasions.

description.zh: 由王室亲军、贵族骑士和部分雇佣骑兵组成，是快速突击与野战核心，但优质战马多依赖西方输入
description.en: Made up of the royal household guard, noble horsemen, and some hired cavalry; it formed the striking arm in field warfare, though quality warhorses depended heavily on western imports

description.zh: 以地方征召农兵、城镇守军和附庸部队为主，擅长守城、围城支援和数量性作战
description.en: Drawn mainly from levied peasants, town garrisons, and feudatory contingents, they were useful for defense, siege support, and mass warfare

description.zh: 数量有限但具威慑力，主要用于冲击敌阵、保护统帅和展示王权威严
description.en: Limited in number but highly prestigious, used for shock action, command protection, and the display of royal power

description.zh: 分散驻守要塞、边境关口和交通节点，负责防御、粮秣储备与治安控制
description.en: Stationed across forts, frontier passes, and transport nodes, responsible for defense, supply storage, and security control

commanderInChief.zh: 苏巴塔伐摩国王亲自统军，辅以大将与附庸首领会议
commanderInChief.en: King Subhatavarman commanded in person, assisted by senior generals and a council of feudatory chiefs

technology.zh: 军事技术属中世纪南亚常规水平，以骑兵、长矛步兵、弓箭、刀剑、链甲和城防工事为主，攻城器械有限，尚未形成火药兵器体系。
technology.en: Military technology stood at a standard medieval South Asian level, centered on cavalry, spear infantry, bows, swords, mail armor, and fortifications; siege engines were limited and no gunpowder weapons were yet in use.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自西方和西北的古吉拉特遮娄其及其他拉其普特竞争者，以及北印度伊斯兰势力南下所带来的新军事压力。德干诸邦的机会主义进攻也可能威胁边境。
threats.en: Major threats came from the Chaulukyas of Gujarat and other Rajput rivals to the west and northwest, as well as the emerging pressure of north Indian Islamic powers moving southward. Opportunistic attacks from Deccan states could also endanger the borders.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 铁环编织甲衣，灵活且防护可靠
description.en: Iron ring-linked armor, flexible and reliably protective

description.zh: 全身钢板铠甲（晚期），防护力顶级
description.en: Full plate steel armor (late period), top-tier protection

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

populationDescription.zh: 人口约一百八十万，分布于马尔瓦高原的农业村社、若干中型城镇以及陀罗等政治文化中心。人口密度在中印度属较高水平，但仍以乡村为绝对主体。
populationDescription.en: The population was about 1.8 million, spread across agrarian villages of the Malwa plateau, a number of medium-sized towns, and political-cultural centers such as Dhar. Population density was relatively high for central India, though overwhelmingly rural.

socialClasses.zh: 王室与拉其普特贵族居于上层，婆罗门掌握宗教与文书权威，城镇商人和行会首领构成富裕中间阶层，广大农民为税赋主体，另有手工业者、牧民、仆役与受歧视群体处于较低社会位置。
socialClasses.en: The royal family and Rajput nobility formed the upper stratum, Brahmins held religious and scribal authority, town merchants and guild leaders made up a prosperous middle layer, the broad peasantry bore the main tax burden, and artisans, herders, servants, and marginalized groups occupied lower social positions.

allies.zh: 王国缺乏长期稳定的正式盟友，更多依靠与周边拉其普特首领、地方附庸及婚姻关系形成临时合作
allies.en: The kingdom lacked enduring formal allies and relied more on temporary cooperation with neighboring Rajput chiefs, local feudatories, and marriage-based ties

enemies.zh: 主要敌对者是古吉拉特遮娄其王国及与摩腊婆争夺边境和威望的其他印度地区势力；北方古尔系与德里方向的穆斯林扩张势力构成日益增长的战略威胁
enemies.en: Its principal enemies were the Chaulukya kingdom of Gujarat and other Indian regional powers competing with Malwa for borderlands and prestige; to the north, Ghurid and Delhi-oriented Muslim expansion posed a growing strategic threat

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维持地区均势、压制附庸离心、争夺商路节点和通过婚盟提升王朝合法性为核心。在更广阔的欧亚格局中，摩腊婆并非远程海贸强权，而是一个重视陆上地缘平衡的内陆王国。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on preserving regional balance, restraining feudatory separatism, competing for trade-route nodes, and enhancing dynastic legitimacy through marriage alliances. In the wider Afro-Eurasian setting, Malwa was not a long-range maritime power but an inland kingdom attentive to overland geopolitical balance.

era.zh: 十字军时代

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术并非突破性发明，而是成熟的灌溉管理、石造寺庙与堡垒建筑、棉纺织工艺、金属锻造、铭文行政和区域道路贸易体系。天文、数学与医学知识仍承续古典印度传统。
keyInnovations.en: Key technologies were not revolutionary inventions but mature systems of irrigation management, stone temple and fort construction, cotton textile production, metal forging, inscription-based administration, and regional road commerce. Astronomy, mathematics, and medicine continued classical Indian traditions.

strengths.zh: 摩腊婆拥有较稳固的农业基础、位处中印度交通要冲、文化声望较高且王朝统治传统深厚。其堡寨网络和拉其普特武士阶层可在地区战争中迅速动员力量。
strengths.en: Malwa possessed a solid agrarian base, a strategic location in central India, considerable cultural prestige, and a well-established dynastic tradition. Its fort network and Rajput warrior elite allowed relatively rapid mobilization in regional warfare.

weaknesses.zh: 王权对地方贵族和附庸依赖较深，财政征收受免税赐地与地方割据限制，野战骑兵质量受制于外来马源，且面对北方新兴突厥-阿富汗军事体系时可能处于不利地位。
weaknesses.en: Royal power depended heavily on local nobles and feudatories, fiscal extraction was constrained by tax-exempt grants and regional fragmentation, field cavalry quality depended on imported horses, and the kingdom could be disadvantaged against the emerging Turkic-Afghan military systems of the north.

outlook.zh: 1200年前后的摩腊婆处于相对稳定但充满隐忧的阶段。若能维持王室权威并有效平衡古吉拉特与北方压力，仍可继续作为中印度重要王国存在；但若遭遇强敌连续入侵或附庸离叛，王朝地位将迅速削弱。
outlook.en: Around 1200, Malwa stood in a relatively stable yet vulnerable position. If it could preserve royal authority and balance pressure from Gujarat and the north, it could continue as a major central Indian kingdom; but repeated invasions or feudatory defection could quickly erode Paramara power.

description.zh: 中印度区域王朝，在拉其普特政治格局中占据一席之地。
description.en: A central Indian regional dynasty holding an important place in the Rajput political order.

governmentForm.zh: 以王权为核心、由封臣与地方领主协同治理的印度教君主制
governmentForm.en: A Hindu monarchy centered on royal authority and supported by feudatories and regional lords

socialStructure.zh: 社会以种姓秩序、地方氏族、商人社团与宗教机构共同构成，上层为王族、武士贵族与婆罗门，中层为城市商人、工匠与寺庙管理者，下层为农民、牧民、劳役者与边缘社群。
socialStructure.en: Society was shaped by caste hierarchy, regional clans, merchant corporations, and religious institutions. The upper strata consisted of the royal family, warrior nobles, and Brahmins; the middle strata included urban merchants, artisans, and temple managers; the lower strata included cultivators, pastoralists, laborers, and marginalized communities.

rulingClass.zh: 查卢基耶王室、拉杰普特式武士贵族、婆罗门顾问与掌握财富的商业精英
rulingClass.en: The Chaulukya royal house, Rajput-style warrior nobility, Brahmin advisers, and wealthy commercial elites

succession.zh: 以父系世袭为主，但在王位争议时期常受宫廷派系、王族支系与强大封臣影响
succession.en: Primarily patrilineal hereditary succession, though succession disputes were often shaped by court factions, collateral royal branches, and powerful feudatories

structure.zh: 王廷设于阿那希拉帕塔卡，中央依靠国王、首席大臣、财政官、军事统帅、文书官与宗教顾问运作；地方则通过行省、县邑、封地与自治市镇管理，王权与地方世家、寺庙机构及商人团体共享实际治理。
structure.en: The royal court at Anahilapataka functioned through the king, chief ministers, fiscal officers, military commanders, scribes, and religious advisers. Provincial, district, feudatory, and semi-autonomous urban structures handled local rule, so practical governance was shared between royal authority, landed houses, temple institutions, and merchant bodies.

function.zh: 处理王命、宫廷政务、封臣关系、外交接待与重大决策
function.en: Handled royal decrees, court administration, feudatory relations, diplomatic reception, and major policy decisions

function.zh: 征收地税、市场税、港口税、道路关卡税，并管理国库与土地收入账册
function.en: Collected land revenue, market dues, port customs, road tolls, and managed treasury accounts and land-income registers

function.zh: 调度王家军队、封臣兵额、边防守备、马匹采购与军需供应
function.en: Oversaw royal troops, feudatory contingents, frontier garrisons, horse procurement, and military supply

function.zh: 保存铜板诏书、裁断土地与商业纠纷、执行王令并监督地方审判
function.en: Preserved copper-plate grants, judged land and commercial disputes, enforced royal orders, and supervised local adjudication

function.zh: 维护道路、蓄水池、阶梯井、城防、寺庙附属设施与部分港口工程
function.en: Maintained roads, reservoirs, stepwells, fortifications, temple-associated works, and some port facilities

name.zh: 宗教捐赠与寺庙事务署
name.en: Religious Endowments and Temple Affairs Office

function.zh: 管理王室对印度教与耆那教机构的赐地、赋税豁免与祭祀性资助
function.en: Managed royal land grants, tax immunities, and ritual patronage for Hindu and Jain institutions

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依赖总督、封臣、乡村首领、城市行会与寺庙管理机构共同运作。沿海商业城市拥有较强自治传统，内陆地区则由王家官员与地方武士家族共同征税和维持治安。
localAdmin.en: Local administration relied on governors, feudatories, village headmen, urban guilds, and temple authorities. Coastal commercial towns often enjoyed stronger traditions of self-management, while inland districts were governed jointly by royal officers and local warrior lineages for taxation and order.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系综合王令、婆罗门法学传统、地方习惯法与商人行会规约。土地、继承、宗教捐赠与种姓事务多依《法经》传统解释，商业争端则常由城市团体与官员共同裁处。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined royal decrees, Brahmanical jurisprudence, local customary law, and merchant-guild regulations. Land, inheritance, religious grants, and caste matters were often interpreted through dharmashastra traditions, while commercial disputes were commonly settled jointly by urban corporations and officials.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入以农业地税为基础，并辅以灌溉收费、市场税、港口关税、手工业课税、过路税、贡赋及封臣献纳。部分寺庙与受赐土地享有减免，导致税制具有明显分层与地域差异。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue rested primarily on agrarian land tax, supplemented by irrigation charges, market dues, port customs, craft taxes, transit tolls, tribute, and payments from feudatories. Some temples and granted estates enjoyed exemptions, making the tax system stratified and regionally varied.

religion.zh: 印度教为主，湿婆派、毗湿奴派与太阳神崇拜并存，耆那教在古吉拉特城市与商人阶层中极具影响力，伊斯兰商人社群也已在沿海港口存在。
religion.en: Hinduism predominated, with Shaiva, Vaishnava, and solar cult traditions present, while Jainism held major influence in Gujarati cities and merchant circles. Muslim trading communities were also established in coastal ports.

philosophy.zh: 思想生活受婆罗门正统学术、寺庙赞助的梵文学问、耆那教伦理与地方政治实用主义共同影响，重视功德、王道、捐赠、名望与商业诚信。
philosophy.en: Intellectual life was shaped by Brahmanical scholasticism, Sanskrit learning under temple patronage, Jain ethics, and pragmatic regional statecraft, emphasizing merit, righteous kingship, donation, prestige, and commercial trust.

writingSystem.zh: 行政与铭文主要使用梵文和地方俗语书写，文字多见于早期古吉拉特—那加利系书体；商业记录与地方文书也使用西印度地区的实用书写形式。
writingSystem.en: Administration and inscriptions mainly used Sanskrit and regional vernaculars, written in early Gujarati-Nagari related scripts. Commercial accounts and local records also employed practical western Indian scribal forms.

culturalAchievements.zh: 古吉拉特在寺庙建筑、阶梯井、水利工程、石雕装饰、耆那教赞助与海港城市文化方面成就显著。摩德拉太阳神庙等建筑传统反映出王朝时期高度成熟的建筑与雕刻艺术，商人捐赠也推动了教育、宗教与慈善设施发展。
culturalAchievements.en: Gujarat excelled in temple architecture, stepwells, hydraulic works, stone carving, Jain patronage, and the urban culture of maritime ports. Traditions represented by monuments such as the Sun Temple at Modhera reveal highly developed building and sculptural arts, while merchant donations supported education, religion, and charitable institutions.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系印度-雅利安语支，以古吉拉特地区的西部印度-雅利安语与梵文并用
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Indo-Aryan branch, with western Indo-Aryan regional speech alongside Sanskrit

gdpDescription.zh: 1200年前后的古吉拉特是南亚最富庶的地区之一，依靠高产农业、棉纺织、手工业、寺庙经济和印度洋贸易取得显著繁荣。其财富并不集中于单一王室财政，而是分散在农村剩余、寺庙资产、商人资本与城市网络之中。
gdpDescription.en: Around 1200, Gujarat was one of the wealthiest regions in South Asia, drawing prosperity from productive agriculture, cotton textiles, manufacturing, temple-based economic activity, and Indian Ocean trade. Wealth was not concentrated solely in the royal treasury, but distributed across agrarian surplus, temple assets, merchant capital, and urban networks.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、棉纺织、染色、珠宝加工、金属工艺、制糖、盐业、造船、海运贸易与寺庙相关建筑业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, cotton textiles, dyeing, jewelry working, metal crafts, sugar production, salt extraction, shipbuilding, maritime commerce, and temple-related construction

tradeGoods.zh: 棉布、染织品、靛蓝、糖、芝麻油、香料转口货、宝石、象牙制品、金属器、盐、马匹进口品与阿拉伯海海运货物
tradeGoods.en: Cotton cloth, dyed textiles, indigo, sugar, sesame oil, re-exported spices, gemstones, ivory goods, metalware, salt, imported horses, and general Arabian Sea maritime cargo

name.zh: 德拉玛与塔卡等区域货币

householdWealth.zh: 普通农户财富主要体现在耕牛、谷物储备、农具与村社关系；城市商人与寺庙则可积累大量金银、土地契据、库存货物和放贷资本。沿海地区家庭财富通常高于干旱内陆地带。
householdWealth.en: Ordinary rural household wealth lay chiefly in draft animals, grain stores, tools, and village ties, while urban merchants and temples could accumulate substantial bullion, land rights, inventories, and lending capital. Coastal households were generally wealthier than those in drier inland zones.

economicSystem.zh: 以农业剩余为基础、市场交换高度活跃、国家与寺庙并行、商人资本强大的混合型区域经济。王室依赖税收与港口收益，城市则由行会、社团与远洋商人推动。
economicSystem.en: A mixed regional economy based on agrarian surplus, vigorous market exchange, parallel state and temple sectors, and powerful merchant capital. The crown depended on taxes and port revenues, while cities were driven by guilds, corporate groups, and long-distance merchants.

source.en: Port customs and maritime trade duties

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况稳健，得益于长期商业税收和相对稳定的农业征收，但大量财富实际上散布于地方领主、寺庙和商人资本之手。王室虽能维持可观储备，战时动员仍需依赖封臣与城市金融支持。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was sound thanks to sustained trade duties and relatively stable agrarian collection, though much wealth in practice remained in the hands of local lords, temples, and merchant capital. The crown maintained substantial reserves, yet wartime mobilization still depended on feudatory and urban financial support.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向稳健保守，维持农业税基与港口税源，同时通过赐地、豁免和宗教资助换取政治忠诚与合法性。国家避免过度榨取商业城市，以保持贸易繁荣。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally cautious and conservative, preserving the agrarian tax base and port revenues while using grants, exemptions, and religious patronage to secure loyalty and legitimacy. The state avoided excessive extraction from commercial cities in order to preserve trade prosperity.

description.zh: 由王室直属骑兵、贵族随从与部分雇佣骑手构成，是机动作战与野战核心，但优质战马高度依赖外来进口。
description.en: Composed of royal cavalry, noble retainers, and some hired horsemen, this was the core arm for maneuver and field warfare, though quality warhorses depended heavily on imports.

description.zh: 包括长矛兵、剑盾兵、弓箭手和地方征召兵，人数最多，适合守城、围城与地方治安，但战场机动性逊于骑兵。
description.en: Included spearmen, sword-and-shield infantry, archers, and local levies. It was the largest arm, suitable for garrisoning, sieges, and internal order, though less mobile in open battle than cavalry.

description.zh: 象队用于震慑、冲击与仪式性展示，在印度战场仍有重要地位，但维护成本高且在快速骑射对抗中存在局限。
description.en: The elephant corps served for shock action, intimidation, and ceremonial display. It still held major value in Indian warfare, though it was expensive to maintain and had limits against fast mounted archery.

description.zh: 主要负责港口巡逻、商路护航、河口与沿海防卫，并非远洋征服海军，而是商业安全导向的海上力量。
description.en: Primarily responsible for port patrol, convoy protection, and estuary and coastal defense; it was not an oceanic conquest navy but a maritime force oriented toward commercial security.

description.zh: 由附庸领主、堡垒守军和边境地方武装组成，在危机时增援王军，是王国军事体系的重要组成部分。
description.en: Consisted of subordinate lords, fortress garrisons, and frontier local forces, reinforcing the royal army in crises and forming an essential part of the kingdom’s military system.

commanderInChief.zh: 毗摩提婆二世名义上为最高统帅，实际由王廷将军与重臣分掌诸军
commanderInChief.en: Bhimdev II was the nominal commander-in-chief, while actual command was exercised by court generals and leading ministers

technology.zh: 军备以复合弓和长弓、长矛、剑、盾、甲衣、攻城器械、石砲与堡垒防御工事为主。海岸地区具备造船与港防经验，但不具备东亚式火药军事体系。
technology.en: Military technology centered on bows, spears, swords, shields, armor, siege devices, stone-throwers, and fortified defenses. Coastal regions had shipbuilding and harbor-defense experience, but the kingdom lacked an East Asian-style gunpowder military system.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自北方与东北方向的突厥-阿富汗军事势力扩张，如古尔王朝及其在北印度的活动；其次是马尔瓦、拉贾斯坦及德干邻邦之间的区域竞争，以及海上贸易线潜在受扰。
threats.en: The main threats came from expanding Turkic-Afghan military powers to the north and northeast, especially the Ghurids and their activity in northern India. Secondary threats included regional rivalry with Malwa, Rajasthan, and Deccan polities, as well as possible disruption of maritime trade routes.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 绞盘上弦重弩，可破重甲
description.en: Windlass-drawn heavy crossbow capable of piercing heavy armor

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

description.zh: 铁环编织甲衣，灵活且防护可靠
description.en: Iron ring-linked armor, flexible and reliably protective

populationDescription.zh: 人口规模在当时印度西部属高水平，主要分布于农业村庄、灌溉绿洲、内陆市场镇和沿海港口城市。人口密度在北古吉拉特和沿海贸易带较高，干旱边缘区较低。
populationDescription.en: The population was high by the standards of western India, concentrated in agricultural villages, irrigated zones, inland market towns, and coastal ports. Density was greater in northern Gujarat and the coastal trade belt, and lower in arid frontier areas.

socialClasses.zh: 王族与武士贵族居于顶层，婆罗门在仪式和法学上拥有崇高地位，富裕商人与耆那社群在城市中影响巨大，其下为工匠、店主、普通农民、牧民和劳役者。种姓与职业社群深刻影响婚姻、税负、司法与社会流动。
socialClasses.en: The royal family and warrior nobility occupied the top tier, Brahmins held high ritual and legal prestige, and wealthy merchants and Jain communities exercised great urban influence. Below them stood artisans, shopkeepers, ordinary cultivators, pastoralists, and laborers. Caste and occupational communities strongly shaped marriage, taxation, justice, and social mobility.

allies.zh: 无固定意义上的长期大国盟友，但与阿拉伯海商人网络、部分南印度与西印度区域政权、以及商业港口中的穆斯林与耆那商人团体保持务实合作关系。
allies.en: There were no permanent great-power allies in a formal sense, but the kingdom maintained pragmatic cooperative ties with Arabian Sea merchant networks, some South and West Indian regional powers, and Muslim and Jain commercial communities in port cities.

enemies.zh: 主要敌对力量为古尔王朝及其在北印度的将领与附属势力；同时与马尔瓦、拉贾斯坦若干王公及邻近地区王国存在时战时和的竞争关系。
enemies.en: Its principal hostile power was the Ghurid state and its commanders and subordinate forces operating in northern India. It also had fluctuating rivalries with rulers in Malwa, Rajasthan, and adjacent regional kingdoms.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交以维持区域均势、保障商路、稳定港口收入和防止北方入侵为核心。王国更重视贸易网络与边境安全，而非远距离领土扩张。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on maintaining regional balance, protecting trade routes, securing port revenue, and preventing northern invasion. The kingdom prioritized commercial networks and frontier security over long-distance territorial expansion.

era.zh: 十字军时代

keyInnovations.zh: 高水平石造寺庙与阶梯井建筑、精细石雕、区域造船技术、棉纺织与染色工艺、灌溉与蓄水工程、商业簿记和远洋贸易组织能力是其代表性优势。
keyInnovations.en: Its representative strengths included advanced stone temple and stepwell construction, refined stone carving, regional shipbuilding, cotton textile and dyeing techniques, irrigation and water-storage engineering, and commercial bookkeeping and long-distance trade organization.

strengths.zh: 古吉拉特王国的核心优势在于富庶农业、活跃海贸、强大商人阶层、成熟的城市网络与卓越的寺庙—水利建筑传统。稳定的财政与多元社会合作，使其在1200年前后仍能保持较强区域影响力。
strengths.en: The kingdom’s main strengths lay in prosperous agriculture, vibrant maritime trade, a powerful merchant class, mature urban networks, and an outstanding tradition of temple and hydraulic architecture. Stable finances and cooperation across a diverse society allowed it to retain strong regional influence around 1200.

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点在于政治权力较为分散，封臣和地方豪强影响显著；精锐骑兵依赖进口马匹；面对北方突厥化军事集团时，机动性与统一指挥可能不足。王室对地方财富的直接控制也有限。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses lay in relatively diffuse political authority, the significant power of feudatories and local magnates, dependence on imported horses for elite cavalry, and possible shortcomings in mobility and unified command when facing northern Turkic-style military powers. Direct royal control over local wealth was also limited.

outlook.zh: 短期内王国仍具稳定与繁荣基础，但随着北印度伊斯兰军事政权扩张和地区竞争加剧，其安全环境将趋于严峻。若能维持商贸收入并整合封臣力量，仍可继续作为西印度重要强国存在；若王权削弱，则易受外敌与内部离心所冲击。
outlook.en: In the short term, the kingdom retained solid foundations of stability and prosperity, but the expansion of Islamic military states in northern India and rising regional competition would make its security environment harsher. If it could preserve commercial revenue and better integrate feudatory power, it could continue as a major western Indian state; if royal authority weakened, it would be vulnerable to both external attack and internal fragmentation.

description.zh: 西印度富庶王国，以商贸城市和寺庙赞助闻名。
description.en: A prosperous western Indian kingdom known for trade cities and temple patronage.

governmentForm.zh: 婆罗门教君主制，依托王室、地方封臣与文书官僚共同治理
governmentForm.en: A Brahmanical monarchy governed through the royal court, local feudatories, and a documentary bureaucracy

socialStructure.zh: 社会以种姓等级、土地控制与乡村共同体为基础；婆罗门、武士化地主与宫廷文士居上层，农民、手工业者、舟人和渔民构成主体，边缘地区部族与低种姓群体承担重役
socialStructure.en: Society rested on caste hierarchy, land control, and village communities; Brahmins, militarized landholding elites, and court literati formed the upper strata, while peasants, artisans, boatmen, and fishing communities made up the majority, and tribal peoples and lower-status groups in frontier zones bore heavier obligations

rulingClass.zh: 塞那王室、婆罗门地主、受封武士贵族、地方总督与宫廷官僚
rulingClass.en: The Sena royal house, Brahmin landholders, feudatory warrior nobles, provincial governors, and court officials

succession.zh: 王位通常按父系世袭传承，并由在位君主生前指定继承人以减少宗室争夺
succession.en: The throne was normally transmitted by patrilineal hereditary succession, often reinforced by the reigning king's designation of an heir during his lifetime to limit dynastic rivalry

structure.zh: 中央政府围绕国王、王室秘书机构、财政征收官与军政大臣运作；地方上依赖行省、县乡网络及受封土豪。政令通过铜版敕令、土地文书与税役命令实施
structure.en: The central government operated around the king, royal secretariat, revenue collectors, and military-administrative ministers; locally it relied on provincial units, district-village networks, and landed feudatories. Orders were carried out through copperplate charters, land records, and revenue-labor directives

function.zh: 起草诏令、保存铜版地券、处理官员任命与外交文书
function.en: Drafted royal orders, preserved copperplate land grants, and handled appointments and diplomatic correspondence

function.zh: 评估耕地、征收地租与附加税，监督粮税、现金税和港市关税
function.en: Assessed cultivated land, collected agrarian revenue and cesses, and supervised grain taxes, cash dues, and port customs

function.zh: 管理王室近卫、象军、骑兵、征召步兵以及地方封臣的军役义务
function.en: Managed the royal guard, elephant corps, cavalry, levied infantry, and the military obligations of feudatories

function.zh: 处理土地争讼、种姓纠纷、寺庙与婆罗门受赐地产的确认
function.en: Handled land disputes, caste conflicts, and confirmation of temple and Brahmin endowments

function.zh: 监管恒河三角洲河港、渡口、航运税与对外贸易征收
function.en: Supervised delta river ports, ferries, navigation dues, and collection from overseas and regional trade

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由邦、县、乡村及港市节点构成，常由王室任命官员与地方豪强共同管理。边疆湿地和森林新垦区尤其依赖受赐土地的婆罗门与武士家族进行整合
localAdmin.en: Local administration consisted of provinces, districts, villages, and port nodes, often managed jointly by royal appointees and local magnates. Frontier wetlands and newly cleared forest zones were especially integrated through Brahmin and warrior families holding granted lands

legalSystem.zh: 法律以婆罗门法典传统、王命和地方习惯法并行为特征。土地边界、赋役、继承和种姓秩序由书面地券与见证人制度支持，刑罚多以罚金、没收和社会惩戒为主
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Brahmanical dharmashastra tradition, royal decree, and local customary law. Land boundaries, dues, inheritance, and caste order were supported by written charters and witness procedures, while punishments often centered on fines, confiscation, and social sanction

taxationSystem.zh: 财政以农业地租为核心，并辅以灌溉、渔业、渡口、手工业、市场交易和港口关税。大量土地因赏赐寺庙、婆罗门和军功贵族而享有不同程度减免，削弱中央直接税基
taxationSystem.en: Taxation was centered on agrarian land revenue, supplemented by irrigation, fisheries, ferries, crafts, market tolls, and port customs. Large amounts of land enjoyed partial exemptions due to grants to temples, Brahmins, and military elites, narrowing the crown's direct tax base

religion.zh: 以婆罗门教印度教为主，特别尊奉毗湿奴、湿婆与女神崇拜；佛教在部分寺院和学术传统中尚存影响，民间信仰则深受河流、蛇神与地方神祇崇拜塑造
religion.en: Religion was predominantly Brahmanical Hinduism, with strong devotion to Vishnu, Shiva, and goddess cults; Buddhism still survived in some monasteries and intellectual traditions, while popular religion remained deeply shaped by river cults, serpent deities, and local spirits

philosophy.zh: 宫廷思想以梵学、法论、毗湿奴派与湿婆派神学、诗学和逻辑学为主，强调王权护法、种姓秩序与学术赞助
philosophy.en: Courtly thought centered on Sanskrit learning, jurisprudence, Vaishnava and Shaiva theology, poetics, and logic, emphasizing royal protection of dharma, caste order, and patronage of scholarship

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用梵文书写与早期东印度文字传统，行政与碑铭多用梵文，地方口语书面化正逐渐发展为早期孟加拉文字文化
writingSystem.en: Writing mainly employed Sanskrit and the eastern Indian script tradition; administration and inscriptions were largely in Sanskrit, while vernacular literary expression was gradually developing toward early Bengali written culture

culturalAchievements.zh: 塞那时期以宫廷梵文文学、铜版铭文、寺庙捐赠制度和学术赞助著称。诗人如阇耶提婆活动于这一文化环境，孟加拉地区在宗教融合、河港社会与地方文学形成方面极具活力
culturalAchievements.en: The Sena period was noted for courtly Sanskrit literature, copperplate inscriptions, temple endowment systems, and patronage of learning. Poets such as Jayadeva flourished in this cultural milieu, and Bengal was highly dynamic in religious synthesis, riverine society, and the formation of regional literary culture

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属印欧语系印度-雅利安语支；宫廷高文化语言为梵语，民间广泛使用古孟加拉语及相关东部印度雅利安方言
languageFamily.en: The main languages belonged to the Indo-European Indo-Aryan branch; Sanskrit served as the high courtly language, while Old Bengali and related eastern Indo-Aryan vernaculars were widely spoken

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以稻作农业为核心，依托恒河-布拉马普特拉三角洲的高产湿地、密集水运和区域集市网络。总体富庶程度在南亚东部居前，但国家对经济的直接提取能力受土地豁免与地方化结构限制
gdpDescription.en: The economy was centered on rice agriculture, supported by the highly productive wetlands of the Ganges-Brahmaputra delta, dense river transport, and regional market networks. Overall prosperity ranked among the stronger economies of eastern South Asia, though the state's direct extraction capacity was limited by tax-exempt grants and localized structures

mainIndustries.zh: 水稻种植、甘蔗、芝麻、椰枣糖、渔业、河运、纺织、造船、制盐、金属器制作、象牙与细工艺
mainIndustries.en: Rice cultivation, sugarcane, sesame, date sugar, fisheries, river transport, textiles, boatbuilding, salt production, metalworking, ivory, and fine crafts

tradeGoods.zh: 稻米、糖、棉布、丝织物、漆器、象牙、香料转运品、槟榔、盐、蜂蜡、木材、船只与河运服务
tradeGoods.en: Rice, sugar, cotton cloth, silk textiles, lacquerware, ivory, transshipped spices, betel nut, salt, beeswax, timber, boats, and river transport services

householdWealth.zh: 普通农户财富主要体现在稻田使用权、牛只、舟具、储粮与家族劳力。河港商人、寺庙与地主家族积累了更可观的金银、布帛和地产
householdWealth.en: Ordinary household wealth was mainly held in rights to rice fields, cattle, boats, stored grain, and family labor. River-port merchants, temples, and landlord families accumulated more substantial stocks of bullion, textiles, and landed property

economicSystem.zh: 王权主导下的农业地租经济，结合地方封地、寺庙受赐庄园、行会与河港商业。市场活跃但并非完全货币化，赋税与交换常以实物、劳役和银贝混合完成
economicSystem.en: An agrarian rent economy under royal authority, combined with local landed estates, temple endowments, guild activity, and river-port commerce. Markets were active but not fully monetized, and taxation and exchange often mixed payment in kind, labor, silver, and cowries

source.en: Ferry, fishery, and river transport dues

source.zh: 附加捐税与手工业征收

category.en: Court, royal household, and bureaucratic salaries

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库维持在较稳健水平，部分以金银储藏，部分以粮仓、布帛、象只与可调动贡赋形式存在。由于大量财富沉淀在寺庙、婆罗门受赐庄园和地方豪强手中，王室可直接动员的现金有限
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury stood at a fairly sound level, held partly in bullion and partly in granaries, textiles, elephants, and callable tribute. Because much wealth was immobilized in temples, Brahmin grant estates, and local magnates, the crown's directly mobilizable cash remained limited

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏保守，重视维持宫廷威望、宗教合法性与常备军供养，而不积极推动深度货币化改革。稳定时期可保持小幅结余，但面临突发入侵时财政机动性不足
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was conservative, prioritizing court prestige, religious legitimacy, and maintenance of the standing forces rather than aggressive monetizing reform. In stable times it could preserve a modest surplus, but it lacked flexibility in the face of sudden invasion

description.zh: 由长矛兵、弓箭手和盾兵组成，是数量最大的兵种，多用于守城、河岸防御与随军推进
description.en: Composed of spearmen, archers, and shield-bearing infantry, this was the largest arm and was used for garrison duty, riverbank defense, and campaign support

description.zh: 数量相对有限，部分依赖外来马匹供应与封臣武士，机动性逊于西北印度和突厥军队
description.en: Relatively limited in number, partly dependent on imported horses and feudatory warriors, and less mobile than the armies of northwestern India or Turkic powers

description.zh: 作为威慑与冲击力量，在平原会战和王室仪式中地位突出，但维护成本高且对快速机动作战适应不足
description.en: A force of intimidation and shock, prominent in open battle and royal display, but expensive to maintain and less suited to rapid mobile warfare

description.zh: 依托三角洲河网执行运输、巡逻、渡河掩护与港口控制，是孟加拉军力的重要地域特色
description.en: Using the delta's river network for transport, patrol, crossing support, and port control, these forces were a distinctive regional strength of Bengal

description.zh: 由地方领主与庄园武装提供，战时集中，但训练和统一指挥程度不高
description.en: Supplied by local lords and estate militias, these troops could be assembled in wartime but were unevenly trained and only loosely unified in command

commanderInChief.zh: 罗什曼那·塞那国王兼任最高统帅，日常由大将与地方军政长官分掌
commanderInChief.en: King Lakshmana Sena served as commander-in-chief, with day-to-day control delegated to senior generals and provincial military governors

technology.zh: 武器以弓、矛、剑、盾、铠甲和战象装备为主，善于水网环境作战与筑垒防守，但缺乏草原式机动骑射体系
technology.en: Military technology centered on bows, spears, swords, shields, armor, and elephant equipment, with strengths in fighting in watery terrain and fortified defense, but lacking a true steppe-style mobile horse-archer system

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自西北方向的突厥-阿富汗军事势力扩张，尤其是古尔王朝及其在北印度的将领；此外，地方封臣离心、边疆控制松散和对快速骑兵突袭反应迟缓也是内在风险
threats.en: The chief threat came from the expansion of Turkic-Afghan military powers from the northwest, especially the Ghurids and their commanders in northern India; additional internal risks included centrifugal feudatories, loose frontier control, and slow response to rapid cavalry raids

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 铁环编织甲衣，灵活且防护可靠
description.en: Iron ring-linked armor, flexible and reliably protective

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中于恒河下游平原、三角洲耕作区与沿河聚落，属于南亚人口密度较高地区之一。随着森林开垦和湿地整治，新农业聚落持续扩展
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated in the lower Ganges plain, delta cultivation zones, and riverine settlements, making it one of the more densely peopled regions of South Asia. New agrarian settlements continued to expand through forest clearance and wetland reclamation

socialClasses.zh: 王室与封臣贵族、婆罗门与寺庙精英、文士与税官、商人和船主、工匠、自由农民、佃农、渔民舟人，以及部族与低种姓劳作者共同构成社会层级
socialClasses.en: The social hierarchy comprised the royal house and feudatory nobility, Brahmins and temple elites, scribes and revenue officials, merchants and boat owners, artisans, free peasants, tenant cultivators, fishing and boating communities, and tribal and lower-status laboring groups

allies.zh: 无稳定意义上的远程正式盟友；与东印度若干地方势力、商人网络及部分邻近王国维持务实关系
allies.en: There were no durable long-distance formal allies; the kingdom maintained pragmatic relations with some eastern Indian powers, merchant networks, and neighboring states

enemies.zh: 直接敌对压力主要来自向恒河平原东进的古尔系突厥军事集团；与北印度其他王国也存在传统竞争与边境摩擦
enemies.en: The main direct hostile pressure came from Ghurid-linked Turkic military forces advancing eastward across the Ganges plain; there was also traditional rivalry and border friction with other north Indian kingdoms

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以维持东印度霸权、保护河港贸易和通过婚姻、册封与威望维系地方从属为主。其战略视野偏区域化，对来自西北的新型突厥军事威胁准备不足
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on maintaining predominance in eastern India, protecting river-port trade, and using marriage, recognition, and prestige to preserve local subordination. Its strategic outlook remained regionally focused and insufficiently prepared for the new Turkic military threat from the northwest

era.zh: 十字军时代

keyInnovations.zh: 成熟的稻作湿地农业、河运船只制造、铜版文书制度、区域纺织生产、糖类加工与河口港市物流组织构成其技术特色；但在重装骑兵机动和复合骑射战法方面落后于突厥对手
keyInnovations.en: Its notable strengths included mature wet-rice agriculture, riverboat construction, copperplate documentary administration, regional textile production, sugar processing, and estuarine port logistics; however, it lagged behind Turkic rivals in mobile cavalry warfare and composite mounted archery

strengths.zh: 孟加拉王国拥有肥沃三角洲农业、高人口承载力、发达内河交通、稳健税收基础与高度活跃的宗教文化生活。塞那王朝在1200年前后仍保持政治稳定与相当的地区威望
strengths.en: The Bengal Kingdom possessed fertile delta agriculture, high demographic capacity, developed inland waterways, a solid revenue base, and highly active religious and cultural life. Around 1200 the Sena dynasty still retained political stability and substantial regional prestige

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点在于军队封臣化、骑兵不足、中央动员速度慢、税基被大量赏赐土地侵蚀，以及对西北方向突袭式征服战争认识不足
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses lay in the feudalized army, inadequate cavalry, slow central mobilization, erosion of the tax base through extensive land grants, and insufficient appreciation of conquest warfare based on rapid attacks from the northwest

outlook.zh: 短期内王朝表面稳定且文化繁荣，但结构性军事弱点使其极易在面对小规模而高机动的突厥精锐时迅速失衡。若无深度军政改革，王国前景将由稳定转向脆弱
outlook.en: In the short term the dynasty appeared stable and culturally flourishing, but its structural military weaknesses made it highly vulnerable to small but mobile Turkic elite forces. Without deep military and administrative reform, the kingdom's outlook was set to shift from stability toward fragility

description.zh: 统治孟加拉的大型区域王朝，在突厥征服前夕仍具强盛文化活力。
description.en: A major Bengal dynasty that remained culturally vibrant on the eve of Turkic conquest.

governmentForm.zh: 神王观念与佛教王权结合的集权君主制帝国
governmentForm.en: A centralized monarchical empire combining the devaraja ideal with Buddhist kingship

socialStructure.zh: 社会以王室与高等贵族为顶层，其下为婆罗门、佛教僧侣、地方官员、军人、工匠、商人、自由农民与依附劳役人口。国家通过寺庙、灌溉工程和地方首领网络组织社会与劳动力。
socialStructure.en: Society was headed by the royal house and high aristocracy, followed by Brahmins, Buddhist clergy, provincial officials, soldiers, artisans, merchants, free peasants, and dependent laborers. The state organized society and manpower through temples, hydraulic works, and networks of local chiefs.

rulingClass.zh: 高棉王室、宫廷贵族、婆罗门祭司与受任命的地方显贵
rulingClass.en: The Khmer royal family, court nobility, Brahmin ritual elites, and appointed provincial notables

succession.zh: 以王族内部继承为主，实际由国王指定、宫廷支持与宗教合法性共同决定，并非严格长子继承
succession.en: Succession was primarily dynastic within the royal house, but in practice depended on royal designation, court backing, and religious legitimacy rather than strict primogeniture

structure.zh: 1200年前后的吴哥帝国由国王直接统摄中央宫廷、王家寺院体系和各大行省。中央权力依赖文书官僚、宗教机构与地方总督共同运作，既具有宫廷型行政特点，也保留曼陀罗式层级与附庸关系。
structure.en: Around 1200 CE, the Angkor Empire was governed through the king’s direct authority over the central court, royal temple establishment, and major provinces. Central power relied on scribal officials, religious institutions, and provincial governors, combining court administration with mandala-style hierarchy and tributary relations.

function.zh: 管理宫廷、王室财产、仪式、粮食供给、工匠与宫廷人员
function.en: Managed the palace, royal estates, court ritual, food supply, artisans, and palace personnel

function.zh: 征收谷物、布匹、林产与劳役，管理仓储、运输和再分配
function.en: Collected grain, cloth, forest products, and labor dues, and supervised storage, transport, and redistribution

function.zh: 负责国立寺院、土地捐献、僧团供养、婆罗门仪式与大型宗教工程
function.en: Oversaw state temples, land endowments, monastic support, Brahmanical rites, and large religious foundations

function.zh: 维护水库、运河、道路、桥梁、医院、休息站与寺庙建筑工程
function.en: Maintained reservoirs, canals, roads, bridges, hospitals, rest houses, and temple construction works

function.zh: 管理禁军、地方征发、军粮、战象、武器和边境防务
function.en: Managed the royal guard, provincial levies, military provisions, war elephants, arms, and frontier defense

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政通过行省、郡社和寺庙领地展开，由王室任命官员、地方首领和宗教机构共同管理。边远地区往往以朝贡、婚姻与军事控制维系统治，而核心平原则由更直接的行政与水利体系支撑。
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through provinces, district communities, and temple estates, jointly managed by royal appointees, local chiefs, and religious institutions. Peripheral areas were often held by tribute, marriage alliances, and military pressure, while the central plain was supported by more direct administration and hydraulic management.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以王命、习惯法、宗教规范和土地文书为基础。案件多由地方官、寺院权威和宫廷共同裁断，重视赋役、土地边界、劳动力归属、盗窃和违抗王命等事项。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on royal decrees, customary practice, religious norms, and land records. Cases were commonly judged by local officials, temple authorities, and the court, with emphasis on taxation and labor obligations, land boundaries, dependent status, theft, and disobedience to royal authority.

taxationSystem.zh: 赋税以实物和劳役为主，主要征收稻米、鱼类、盐、蜂蜡、象牙、木材、布匹与季节性徭役。对核心地区征收较稳定，对附庸和边疆则更多体现为朝贡与军事支援。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation was primarily in kind and labor service, with major levies in rice, fish, salt, beeswax, ivory, timber, cloth, and seasonal corvée. Core regions paid more regularly, while tributaries and frontier zones contributed more through tribute and military support.

religion.zh: 上座部佛教尚未完全主导，宫廷以大乘佛教为核心并与印度教传统并存，国王以观世音式慈悲王形象自我塑造，同时保留湿婆、毗湿奴和王权神圣化仪式。
religion.en: Theravada Buddhism had not yet become dominant; the court centered on Mahayana Buddhism while coexisting with Hindu traditions. The king fashioned himself as a compassionate ruler in an Avalokiteshvara-like mode while preserving Shaiva, Vaishnava, and sacral kingship rituals.
