treasuryDescription.zh: 国库多由金粉、银重、牲畜和仓储粮食构成，流动性有限但足以应对常规赈济与征战。贵重财富相当部分掌握在王室与地方首领手中。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted largely of gold dust, silver by weight, livestock, and stored grain; liquidity was limited but adequate for routine relief and campaigning. A substantial share of high-value wealth remained in the hands of the crown and provincial chiefs.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏重维持商路安全与王权联盟，通过稳定贡赋与关税而非高强度直接征税来维系统治。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized securing trade routes and maintaining royal alliances, relying on stable tribute and customs rather than intensive direct taxation.

description.zh: 以矛、盾和弓为主，负责守卫王都、仓储和河谷要地。
description.en: Equipped mainly with spears, shields, and bows, guarding the capital, granaries, and key riverine points.

description.zh: 数量有限但机动性强，用于边境巡逻、追击和展示王权。
description.en: Limited in number but highly mobile, used for frontier patrols, pursuit, and displays of royal power.

description.zh: 战时由地方首领率领，适合护送、袭扰和区域防御。
description.en: Raised in wartime under local chiefs, suited for escort duties, raiding, and regional defense.

commanderInChief.zh: 塔克鲁尔王
commanderInChief.en: King of Takrur

technology.zh: 军事技术以萨赫勒轻骑兵、弓矛步兵和有限铁器制造为基础，攻城能力较弱，但适应河谷与草原作战。战力更多依赖动员网络和地理熟悉度，而非重装装备。
technology.en: Military technology was based on Sahelian light cavalry, bow-and-spear infantry, and limited ironworking; siege capacity was weak, but forces were well adapted to river valley and savanna warfare. Effectiveness depended more on mobilization networks and knowledge of terrain than on heavy equipment.

unit.en: kg of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自邻近萨赫勒政权的竞争、附属社群离心以及商路控制权争夺。干旱与饥荒也会直接削弱征兵与补给能力。
threats.en: Main threats came from competing Sahelian polities, centrifugal tendencies among subordinate communities, and struggles over trade-route control. Drought and famine could also directly weaken recruitment and supply.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中于塞内加尔河谷与灌溉农业区，城乡边界相对模糊。伊斯兰化城镇人口比例不高，但在政治和贸易上影响显著。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated in the Senegal River valley and irrigated agricultural zones, with a relatively blurred urban-rural divide. The Islamized town population was not large, but it had outsized political and commercial influence.

socialClasses.zh: 王族与贵族、伊斯兰学者与商人、自由农牧民、工匠、依附民与奴隶。
socialClasses.en: Royal and noble elites, Islamic scholars and merchants, free farmers and pastoralists, artisans, dependents, and slaves.

allies.zh: 与跨撒哈拉穆斯林商人网络及若干邻近首领维持务实合作。
allies.en: Maintained pragmatic cooperation with trans-Saharan Muslim merchant networks and certain neighboring chiefs.

enemies.zh: 与争夺河谷、金盐贸易及附庸控制权的邻近萨赫勒势力存在长期竞争。
enemies.en: Faced ongoing rivalry from neighboring Sahelian powers competing for the river valley, gold-salt trade, and dependent communities.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以控制商路、维持伊斯兰外交联系和稳固属邦体系为主。王权倾向通过婚姻、纳贡和有限军事行动扩展影响。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on controlling trade routes, maintaining Islamic diplomatic contacts, and stabilizing the tributary system. The crown preferred to extend influence through marriage, tribute, and limited military expeditions.

era.zh: 中世纪西非萨赫勒伊斯兰化时期
era.en: Medieval West African Sahelian Islamic era

keyInnovations.zh: 铁器工具、河谷灌溉农业、阿拉伯文文书、跨撒哈拉商队组织。
keyInnovations.en: Iron tools, river-valley irrigated agriculture, Arabic documentary practice, and trans-Saharan caravan organization.

strengths.zh: 地处商路节点，伊斯兰网络带来合法性与贸易收益；王权可整合河谷农业与草原畜牧资源。
strengths.en: It sat on key trade routes, and Islamic networks brought legitimacy and commercial revenue; the monarchy could integrate riverine agriculture with savanna pastoral resources.

weaknesses.zh: 行政能力有限，对边缘地区控制不稳，经济易受气候波动与商路转移影响。
weaknesses.en: Administrative capacity was limited, control over peripheral areas was fragile, and the economy was vulnerable to climate shifts and trade-route changes.

outlook.zh: 若能持续控制贸易与附属首领，王国可保持区域影响；但面对更大西非强权时，其独立性容易被削弱。
outlook.en: If it continued to control trade and subordinate chiefs, the kingdom could retain regional influence; however, its independence was vulnerable when confronted by larger West African powers.

description.zh: 塔克鲁尔是塞内加尔河流域一个以伊斯兰王权和跨撒哈拉贸易为支柱的萨赫勒王国。
description.en: Takrur was a Sahelian kingdom in the Senegal River valley built on Islamic kingship and trans-Saharan trade.

dynasty.zh: 圣吉尔家族的图卢兹伯爵政权
dynasty.en: The House of Saint-Gilles in the County of Toulouse

governmentForm.zh: 由伯爵统治的封建领邦，名义上臣属于法兰西王室，但在南法享有较强自治。
governmentForm.en: A feudal principality ruled by a count, nominally subject to the French crown but enjoying strong autonomy in southern France.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由伯爵及其诸侯、骑士、小贵族、城市市民、教士和广大农民构成。南法城市商业活跃，较北法更具市政传统与契约文化。乡村地区仍以庄园、租佃和封臣关系为核心。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the count and his vassals, knights, lesser nobles, urban burghers, clergy, and a large peasantry. The towns of southern France were commercially active and possessed stronger municipal traditions and contractual culture than many northern regions. Rural life still centered on manors, tenures, and feudal bonds.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层包括伯爵家族、世俗贵族、高级教士与重要城镇寡头。伯爵必须在贵族、主教与城市精英之间维持平衡。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class included the comital family, secular nobles, senior clergy, and oligarchs from major towns. The count had to balance the interests of nobles, bishops, and urban elites.

succession.zh: 伯爵位通常依家族世袭继承，以长子优先为主，但也受婚姻、封臣承认及法王干预影响。1200年前后，继承合法性与教会关系尤为重要。
succession.en: The county normally passed by hereditary succession, generally favoring the eldest son, though marriage, vassal recognition, and royal intervention also mattered. Around 1200, dynastic legitimacy and relations with the Church were especially important.

structure.zh: 伯爵通过宫廷、封臣网络和城市谈判实施统治。核心领地由伯爵直辖官员管理，外围地区则依赖子封臣、主教区和特许城市。因宗教冲突加剧，行政与司法 increasingly 被用于压制异端与维持秩序。
structure.en: The count ruled through his court, a network of vassals, and negotiation with towns. Core lands were managed by comital officers, while peripheral areas relied on sub-vassals, bishoprics, and chartered communes. As religious conflict intensified, administration and justice were increasingly used to suppress heresy and maintain order.

function.zh: 处理敕令、封地文书、外交函件和财政记载。
function.en: Handled charters, feudal documentation, diplomatic correspondence, and fiscal records.

function.zh: 征收领地收入、市场税、通行税和城市缴款。
function.en: Collected domain income, market dues, tolls, and payments from towns.

function.zh: 主持伯爵法庭、处理封建诉讼并监督地方治安。
function.en: Ran comital courts, handled feudal disputes, and supervised local order.

function.zh: 组织封臣兵役、守备城堡和补给征发。
function.en: Organized feudal service, castle garrisons, and military provisioning.

localAdmin.zh: 地方由城堡长官、领主、执达官与城市官员共同管理。图卢兹、阿尔比等城镇拥有一定自治传统，但伯爵仍试图保持司法与财政优先权。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was shared by castellans, lords, bailiff-like officers, and urban officials. Towns such as Toulouse and Albi possessed traditions of partial self-government, but the count still sought to preserve judicial and fiscal primacy.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系融合封建习惯法、城市特许法、教会法与日益复兴的罗马法影响。宗教审查和异端问题使教会法庭的作用明显增强。
legalSystem.en: The legal system blended feudal customary law, urban charter law, canon law, and the growing influence of revived Roman law. Religious scrutiny and heresy issues significantly increased the role of ecclesiastical courts.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自伯爵直辖地产、通行税、市场税、罚金和封臣义务。战时还可征收特别税或要求城市提供贷款与物资。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from comital demesne, tolls, market dues, fines, and feudal obligations. In wartime, extraordinary levies could be raised and towns might be pressed to provide loans and supplies.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 图卢兹伯爵领是吟游诗人文化的中心之一，宫廷爱情诗与奥克语文学在欧洲影响深远。城市法权、教会学校和抄写传统也推动了南法文化的独特性。
culturalAchievements.en: The County of Toulouse was one of the centers of troubadour culture, and its courtly love poetry in Occitan had deep influence across Europe. Urban legal traditions, church schools, and manuscript culture also gave southern France a distinctive cultural profile.

languageFamily.zh: 罗曼语族奥克语支，书面行政语言为拉丁语
languageFamily.en: Romance, chiefly Occitan, with Latin as the written administrative language

philosophy.zh: 以拉丁基督教为主导，同时受奥克语宫廷文化、骑士伦理和较开放的城市学术风气影响。
philosophy.en: Dominated by Latin Christianity, while also shaped by Occitan courtly culture, chivalric ideals, and a relatively open urban intellectual climate.

writingSystem.zh: 正式文书主要使用拉丁文，宫廷诗歌与地方交流广泛使用奥克语。
writingSystem.en: Latin was used for formal documents, while Occitan was widely employed in courtly poetry and regional communication.

unit.en: kg of silver equivalent per year
kg silver per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以谷物、葡萄酒、畜牧、手工业与区域贸易构成，在法国诸侯领地中较为富庶。城市市场与地中海—内陆交通联系提升了现金流通和商业税收。
gdpDescription.en: The economy rested on grain, wine, livestock, crafts, and regional trade, making it relatively prosperous among French principalities. Urban markets and links between the Mediterranean and inland routes increased monetization and commercial taxation.

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物农业、葡萄酒、羊毛与纺织、皮革、陶器、桥路通行贸易
mainIndustries.en: Grain agriculture, wine production, wool and textiles, leatherworking, pottery, and transit trade

tradeGoods.zh: 葡萄酒、羊毛、布匹、盐、谷物、皮革、金属制品
tradeGoods.en: Wine, wool, cloth, salt, grain, leather, and metal goods

householdWealth.zh: 农村家庭财富主要表现为土地使用权、牲畜和粮食储存，城市家庭则更多持有现金、工具和商货。贵族财富集中于庄园收益、磨坊、酒榨与通行税权。
householdWealth.en: Rural household wealth lay mainly in land-use rights, livestock, and stored grain, while urban households held more cash, tools, and merchandise. Noble wealth was concentrated in manor income, mills, wine presses, and toll rights.

unit.en: kg silver per person per year
kg of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以封建地产经济为基础、辅以高度活跃的城市市场与区域商业交换的混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based on feudal landed production, complemented by highly active urban markets and regional commercial exchange.

unit.en: kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year

source.zh: 司法罚金与封臣义务折现
source.en: Judicial fines and commuted feudal obligations

unit.en: kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year

treasuryDescription.zh: 伯爵国库具有一定现金化程度，但因政治紧张与军事准备而承压。城市借贷和贵族赞助网络对弥补短缺颇为重要。
treasuryDescription.en: The comital treasury was somewhat monetized, but strained by political tension and military readiness. Urban credit and aristocratic patronage networks were important in covering shortfalls.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策倾向维持城市合作与常规税源，同时在危机时以特别征收和借贷应对。宗教冲突使财政稳定性明显下降。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed to preserve cooperation with towns and regular revenue streams, while responding to crises through extraordinary levies and borrowing. Religious conflict significantly reduced fiscal stability.

description.zh: 由伯爵直属封臣与附庸提供，是野战中的核心冲击力量。
description.en: Provided by the count's direct vassals and sub-vassals, forming the core shock force in field warfare.

description.zh: 由乡村征召兵和城市民兵组成，擅长守城、护路和围城支援。
description.en: Composed of rural levies and town militias, suited to garrison, route security, and siege support.

description.zh: 驻守关键要塞与桥梁，保障伯爵对交通线和据点的控制。
description.en: Stationed in key fortresses and bridge points to secure comital control over routes and strongholds.

commanderInChief.zh: 雷蒙六世伯爵
commanderInChief.en: Count Raymond VI

technology.zh: 军事技术为典型西欧封建水平，依靠锁子甲骑士、长矛步兵、弩和石制城堡体系。其防御能力不弱，但在长期大规模战争中受制于封臣服役期限和财政动员能力。
technology.en: Military technology was typical of feudal western Europe, relying on mail-armored knights, spear infantry, crossbows, and stone castles. Defensive capacity was solid, but prolonged large-scale war was constrained by limited feudal service terms and fiscal mobilization.

unit.en: kg of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 最大威胁来自阿尔比派争端所引发的教会与北方法兰西贵族干预。内部贵族离心、城镇摇摆和教权压力共同削弱伯爵领的军事整合力。
threats.en: The greatest threat arose from Church and northern French noble intervention linked to the Cathar controversy. Internal noble fragmentation, wavering towns, and ecclesiastical pressure all weakened the county's military cohesion.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

populationDescription.zh: 人口分布较均衡，兼具富庶乡村和活跃城镇。图卢兹是南法重要都市，具备显著的商业、宗教与政治中心地位。
populationDescription.en: The population was fairly balanced between productive countryside and active towns. Toulouse was a major southern French city with strong commercial, religious, and political centrality.

socialClasses.zh: 伯爵与大贵族、骑士与小贵族、教士、城市市民与商人、手工业者、自由农与佃农。
socialClasses.en: Count and high nobility, knights and lesser nobles, clergy, townsmen and merchants, artisans, free peasants, and tenants.

allies.zh: 与部分奥克语诸侯、南法城市及阿拉贡方面存在阶段性合作。
allies.en: Maintained intermittent cooperation with some Occitan lords, southern French towns, and the Aragonese sphere.

enemies.zh: 面临教廷不信任、北方法兰西贵族敌意及与异端问题相关的外部干涉。
enemies.en: Faced papal distrust, hostility from northern French nobles, and foreign interference tied to the heresy issue.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策重在维护南法自治、平衡法王与阿拉贡影响，并尽量避免全面教会制裁。然到1200年前后，宗教政治危机已显著缩小其回旋空间。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy aimed to preserve southern autonomy, balance French royal and Aragonese influence, and avoid full ecclesiastical sanctions. By around 1200, however, the religio-political crisis had sharply narrowed room for maneuver.

era.zh: 中世纪盛期南法封建与城市文化时代
era.en: High medieval southern French feudal and urban era

keyInnovations.zh: 石造城堡、弩、改良犁耕、葡萄酒生产技术、拉丁文与罗马法文书实践。
keyInnovations.en: Stone castles, crossbows, improved plough agriculture, wine-production techniques, and Latin-Roman legal documentary practices.

strengths.zh: 经济富庶、城市活跃、文化影响力强，且地理上连接地中海与法国内陆。
strengths.en: It was prosperous, urbanized, and culturally influential, while geographically linking the Mediterranean with inland France.

weaknesses.zh: 政治结构分散，过度依赖贵族合作；宗教冲突使合法性和军事实力同时受损。
weaknesses.en: Its political structure was fragmented and overly dependent on noble cooperation; religious conflict damaged both legitimacy and military strength.

outlook.zh: 若无外部十字军干预，伯爵领仍可能保持区域强权地位；但现实上其前景因阿尔比十字军前夜的危机而极为不稳。
outlook.en: Without external crusading intervention, the county might have remained a leading regional power; in reality, its outlook was highly unstable on the eve of the Albigensian Crusade.

description.zh: 图卢兹伯爵领是南法一个富庶而文化繁荣、但因宗教与政治危机陷入冲突的强大封建领邦。
description.en: The County of Toulouse was a wealthy and culturally vibrant southern French principality, yet one drawn into conflict by religious and political crisis.

dynasty.zh: 卡佩支系的勃艮第公爵家族
dynasty.en: The Capetian cadet line of the Duchy of Burgundy

governmentForm.zh: 由公爵统治的法兰西封建大公国，在王权框架内保有强大的地方领主权。
governmentForm.en: A major feudal duchy ruled by a duke, retaining strong regional lordship within the framework of the French monarchy.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由公爵家族、大贵族、骑士、修道院与主教团体、城市居民和农民构成。勃艮第的修道院网络、葡萄种植区和交通要道使教会、贵族与城市之间形成复杂互动。农村仍是人口主体，但城镇商业和酒业收益不断上升。
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of the ducal family, high nobles, knights, monasteries and bishops, townspeople, and peasants. Burgundy's dense monastic network, vineyard districts, and key transport corridors created complex interaction between church, nobility, and towns. The countryside remained dominant demographically, but urban commerce and wine revenues were rising.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层包括公爵、直属封臣、高级教士和重要城市精英。修道院院长与主教在土地、司法和政治协商中具有显著地位。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class included the duke, his direct vassals, senior clergy, and major urban elites. Abbots and bishops held notable importance in landholding, justice, and political negotiation.

succession.zh: 公爵位实行家族世袭，原则上以男性嫡系继承为主。继承需得到主要封臣承认，并受法国王权的宗主确认。
succession.en: The duchy was hereditary, in principle passing through the legitimate male line. Succession required recognition by leading vassals and overlord confirmation from the French crown.

structure.zh: 公爵通过宫廷、巡回司法和城堡网络治理领地，对核心地区掌控较强。地方权力由伯爵、男爵、修道院和主教区分掌，因此公爵治理更多体现为协调与层级主从关系，而非高度集中官僚制。
structure.en: The duke governed through his court, itinerant justice, and a network of castles, exercising stronger control in the core lands. Local power was shared among counts, barons, monasteries, and bishoprics, so ducal rule was more a matter of coordination and hierarchical lordship than a highly centralized bureaucracy.

function.zh: 起草敕令、保管封地文书、处理外交和领主契约。
function.en: Drafted charters, kept feudal records, and handled diplomacy and lordly contracts.

function.zh: 管理公爵直辖庄园、酒税、市场税和桥路通行收入。
function.en: Managed ducal demesnes, wine dues, market taxes, and bridge and road tolls.

function.zh: 组织公爵法庭、处理封建纠纷并监督地方司法权。
function.en: Organized ducal courts, handled feudal disputes, and supervised local jurisdictions.

function.zh: 协调封臣兵役、要塞维护和战时补给。
function.en: Coordinated feudal service, fortress maintenance, and wartime provisioning.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由公爵代理人、城堡长官、领主法庭及教会机构共同承担。修道院和主教区在征收地租、调解争端和管理乡村资源方面作用突出。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was shared by ducal agents, castellans, seigneurial courts, and church institutions. Monasteries and bishoprics played prominent roles in rent collection, dispute mediation, and management of rural resources.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以封建习惯法为主，辅以教会法和城市特许法。公爵法庭在重大领主纠纷、地产权和暴力案件中拥有较高权威。
legalSystem.en: The legal order was based mainly on feudal customary law, supplemented by canon law and urban charter law. Ducal courts held high authority in major seigneurial disputes, property matters, and cases of violence.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政主要依赖直辖庄园收益、通行税、市场税、酒类相关征收和司法罚金。特殊战时负担常通过封臣义务、城市援助金或临时征收解决。
taxationSystem.en: Finances depended chiefly on demesne income, tolls, market dues, wine-related charges, and judicial fines. Extraordinary wartime needs were often met through feudal obligations, urban aids, or temporary levies.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 勃艮第承继克吕尼修道院传统，在宗教改革、礼仪文化和手抄本制作上具有广泛影响。其葡萄园经济、教堂建筑和修道院网络构成地区文化特色。
culturalAchievements.en: Burgundy inherited the legacy of Cluniac monasticism and exerted broad influence in religious reform, liturgical culture, and manuscript production. Its vineyard economy, church architecture, and monastic networks defined its regional culture.

languageFamily.zh: 罗曼语族，行政书写为拉丁语，民间通行古法语方言
languageFamily.en: Romance; Latin for administration, with Old French dialects in everyday use

philosophy.zh: 以拉丁基督教和修道院文化为核心，强调骑士荣誉、封建忠诚与教会秩序。
philosophy.en: Centered on Latin Christianity and monastic culture, with strong emphasis on chivalric honor, feudal loyalty, and ecclesiastical order.

writingSystem.zh: 正式文书使用拉丁文，日常口语以古法语和勃艮第方言为主。
writingSystem.en: Formal documents were written in Latin, while spoken life used Old French and Burgundian dialect forms.

unit.en: kg of silver equivalent per year
kg silver per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 勃艮第经济以农业、葡萄酒、畜牧和内陆贸易为基础，在法兰西诸侯中属较富裕地区。其地理位置连接巴黎盆地、罗讷河道和帝国边界，利于市场整合与通行税收入。
gdpDescription.en: Burgundy's economy was based on agriculture, wine, livestock, and inland trade, making it one of the wealthier French principalities. Its geography linked the Paris Basin, the Rhône corridor, and the imperial frontier, favoring market integration and toll revenues.

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物农业、葡萄酒酿造、畜牧、磨坊加工、纺织、金属与木工手工业
mainIndustries.en: Grain farming, wine production, livestock raising, milling, textiles, and metal and wood crafts

tradeGoods.zh: 葡萄酒、谷物、木材、盐、羊毛、皮革、金属器
tradeGoods.en: Wine, grain, timber, salt, wool, leather, and metalwares

householdWealth.zh: 一般农户财富体现为耕地、葡萄园份额、牲畜和工具，城镇家庭则更偏向现金与商货。修道院和贵族拥有大量稳定地产收益，是地区财富最集中的持有者。
householdWealth.en: Ordinary peasant wealth was held in arable land, vineyard shares, livestock, and tools, while town households held more cash and merchandise. Monasteries and nobles possessed large, stable landed revenues and were the greatest concentrations of wealth in the region.

unit.en: kg silver per person per year
kg of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以封建地产、教会土地与城市市场共同支撑的区域性货币化农业经济。
economicSystem.en: A regional monetizing agrarian economy supported jointly by feudal estates, church lands, and urban markets.

unit.en: kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year

source.zh: 公爵直辖地产与庄园收益

unit.en: kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year

source.zh: 司法罚金与封臣义务折现
source.en: Judicial fines and commuted feudal obligations

unit.en: kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year
kg of silver equivalent per year

treasuryDescription.zh: 公爵财政较稳健，依赖稳定地产收入和通道税源，储备水平在法兰西诸侯中属较高。修道院和大贵族的独立财富也为地区信用环境提供支撑。
treasuryDescription.en: Ducal finances were relatively sound, relying on stable estate revenues and route tolls, and reserves were high by French princely standards. The independent wealth of monasteries and great nobles also supported the region's credit environment.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以保持直辖地产收益、维护交通线税源和避免与教会正面冲突为主。公爵更倾向稳健经营而非激进加税。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on preserving demesne income, maintaining tolls on transport corridors, and avoiding direct confrontation with the Church. The duke generally preferred prudent management over aggressive taxation.

description.zh: 由公爵直属封臣和附庸骑士组成，是主要野战打击力量。
description.en: Composed of the duke's direct vassals and sub-vassal knights, forming the main striking arm in field operations.

description.zh: 以矛兵、弩手和乡村征召兵为主，用于守城、围城和地方治安。
description.en: Consisted mainly of spearmen, crossbowmen, and rural levies, used for garrison duty, sieges, and local security.

description.zh: 驻守第戎及各处城堡，保障道路与庄园中心安全。
description.en: Stationed in Dijon and various castles to secure roads and estate centers.

commanderInChief.zh: 勃艮第公爵厄德三世
commanderInChief.en: Duke Odo III of Burgundy

technology.zh: 勃艮第军事技术为成熟的西欧封建体系，拥有锁子甲骑士、弩兵、石砌要塞和较完善的后勤集结能力。其作战优势在于防御、贵族骑兵质量与城堡网络，而非长期常备军规模。
technology.en: Burgundian military technology reflected a mature western European feudal system with mail-armored knights, crossbowmen, stone fortifications, and fairly effective logistical concentration. Its strengths lay in defense, the quality of noble cavalry, and the castle network rather than in a large permanent army.

unit.en: kg of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自邻近诸侯竞争、王权调动要求以及与帝国边境贸易和通道控制相关的摩擦。内部方面，强大教会领主与地方贵族也可能限制公爵集中兵权。
threats.en: Main threats came from rival neighboring princes, demands from the French crown, and frictions tied to trade and route control near the imperial frontier. Internally, powerful church lords and local nobles could also limit ducal military centralization.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

description.zh: 铁环编织甲衣，灵活且防护可靠
description.en: Iron ring-linked armor, flexible and reliably protective

populationDescription.zh: 勃艮第人口主要分布在农业平原、葡萄园区和交通沿线城镇。城市化程度中等，但第戎及若干主教城市已形成稳定的商业和宗教中心。
populationDescription.en: Burgundy's population was concentrated in agricultural plains, vineyard districts, and towns along transport corridors. Urbanization was moderate, but Dijon and several episcopal towns had become stable commercial and religious centers.

socialClasses.zh: 公爵与大贵族、骑士、主教与修道院团体、城市商人与工匠、自由农民与农奴。
socialClasses.en: Duke and high nobility, knights, bishops and monastic bodies, urban merchants and artisans, free peasants, and serfs.

allies.zh: 总体上与法兰西王室保持合作，并与部分邻近诸侯和教会机构维持互利关系。
allies.en: Generally cooperated with the French crown and maintained mutually beneficial ties with neighboring princes and church institutions.

enemies.zh: 无单一绝对宿敌，但与周边领主、通道竞争者及个别教俗势力时有摩擦。
enemies.en: It had no single overriding enemy, but frequently experienced friction with neighboring lords, route rivals, and particular secular or ecclesiastical powers.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以维护公国自治、巩固王室关系、保护交通线和调节教俗势力平衡为主。公爵通常采取谨慎而现实的联盟策略。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy aimed to preserve ducal autonomy, sustain ties with the crown, protect transport corridors, and balance secular and ecclesiastical power. The duke generally pursued cautious and pragmatic alliances.

era.zh: 中世纪盛期法兰西封建—修道院经济时代
era.en: High medieval French feudal-monastic economic era

keyInnovations.zh: 三圃制推广、重犁与马具改良、石造城堡、弩、葡萄酒储运技术、拉丁文书行政。
keyInnovations.en: Spread of three-field agriculture, improved heavy ploughs and horse harnessing, stone castles, crossbows, wine storage and transport techniques, and Latin documentary administration.

strengths.zh: 地产收入稳固，地理位置优越，修道院网络与葡萄酒经济提供持续财富和文化影响。
strengths.en: Its estate income was stable, geography advantageous, and monastic networks plus the wine economy provided sustained wealth and cultural influence.

weaknesses.zh: 政治上仍受封建分权限制，教会与地方领主势力强，集中统治与快速动员能力有限。
weaknesses.en: Politically it remained constrained by feudal decentralization, with powerful church and local lordships limiting central authority and rapid mobilization.

outlook.zh: 在1200年前后，勃艮第前景整体稳健，只要维持与法王和教会的良好关系，公国即可继续作为法国中东部的重要强权。
outlook.en: Around 1200, Burgundy's outlook was broadly stable; so long as it maintained good relations with the French king and the Church, it could continue as a major power in east-central France.

description.zh: 勃艮第是一个以封建地产、修道院网络和葡萄酒贸易支撑、政治稳健的法兰西大公国。
description.en: Burgundy was a politically stable major French duchy sustained by feudal estates, monastic networks, and wine trade.

title.zh: 第四次十字军东征筹备

description.zh: 教皇英诺森三世号召发动第四次十字军东征，法兰西和佛兰德斯的骑士响应号召，但因无力支付威尼斯的船费而被迫改变目标。这场东征最终将偏离圣地，转向君士坦丁堡。
description.en: Pope Innocent III called for the Fourth Crusade. Knights from France and Flanders answered the call, but their inability to pay Venice for transport forced a change of target. The crusade would ultimately deviate from the Holy Land toward Constantinople.

description.zh: 第四次十字军在威尼斯的操纵下攻陷了匈牙利治下的天主教城市扎拉（今克罗地亚扎达尔），以抵偿船费。这是十字军首次攻击基督教城市，教皇随即对威尼斯处以绝罚。
description.en: Manipulated by Venice, the Fourth Crusade sacked the Hungarian Catholic city of Zara (modern Zadar, Croatia) to offset transport debts. It was the first time Crusaders attacked a Christian city; the Pope promptly excommunicated the Venetians.

title.zh: 十字军洗劫君士坦丁堡

description.zh: 第四次十字军攻破并洗劫了拜占庭帝国首都君士坦丁堡，大量珍贵文物和财富被掠夺。十字军在废墟上建立了拉丁帝国，拜占庭帝国遭受致命打击，东西方基督教会的裂痕从此不可弥合。
description.en: The Fourth Crusade breached and sacked the Byzantine capital of Constantinople, looting vast quantities of treasures and artifacts. The Crusaders established the Latin Empire on the ruins, dealing a fatal blow to Byzantium and making the East-West Christian schism irreparable.

description.zh: 铁木真在忽里台大会上被推举为成吉思汗，统一了蒙古草原上的所有游牧部落。这标志着蒙古帝国的诞生，一个将改变欧亚大陆面貌的庞大征服机器就此启动。
description.en: Temüjin was proclaimed Genghis Khan at a kurultai, unifying all nomadic tribes of the Mongolian steppe. This marked the birth of the Mongol Empire — a vast conquering machine that would reshape the face of Eurasia.

description.zh: 教皇英诺森三世宣布对法国南部的卡特里派异端发动十字军。北方法兰西贵族率军南下，对朗格多克地区的卡特里派和保护他们的领主展开长达二十年的血腥讨伐。
description.en: Pope Innocent III declared a crusade against the Cathar heresy in southern France. Northern French nobles led armies southward, launching a twenty-year bloody campaign against the Cathars in Languedoc and the lords who sheltered them.

description.zh: 成吉思汗率军攻入西夏，围攻其首都中兴府。西夏被迫求和并向蒙古称臣纳贡，成为蒙古帝国扩张的第一个重大牺牲品。
description.en: Genghis Khan led his forces into Western Xia, besieging its capital Zhongxingfu. Western Xia was forced to sue for peace and submit as a tribute state to the Mongols, becoming the first major victim of Mongol imperial expansion.

description.zh: 英格兰国王约翰在贵族叛乱的压力下，被迫在兰尼米德签署《大宪章》，承认贵族的权利并限制王权。这份文件成为英国宪政和西方法治传统的基石。
description.en: Under pressure from a baronial revolt, King John of England was forced to sign the Magna Carta at Runnymede, acknowledging noble rights and limiting royal authority. This document became the cornerstone of English constitutionalism and the Western rule of law tradition.

description.zh: 教皇英诺森三世在罗马召开第四次拉特朗公会议，这是中世纪最重要的教会会议之一。会议制定了圣体变质论教义，规定每年忏悔和领圣餐的义务，并推动了新的十字军东征计划。
description.en: Pope Innocent III convened the Fourth Lateran Council in Rome, one of the most important ecclesiastical councils of the Middle Ages. It defined the doctrine of transubstantiation, mandated annual confession and communion, and promoted plans for a new crusade.

description.zh: 成吉思汗因花剌子模沙杀害蒙古商队和使臣，亲率大军西征。蒙古军队以摧枯拉朽之势攻陷布哈拉、撒马尔罕等中亚名城，花剌子模帝国在一年内土崩瓦解。
description.en: Genghis Khan personally led a massive westward campaign against Khwarazm after the Shah executed Mongol merchants and envoys. Mongol forces swept through Central Asia, capturing Bukhara, Samarkand, and other great cities. The Khwarazmian Empire collapsed within a year.

title.en: Rise of Neo-Confucianism in Southern Song

description.zh: 朱熹的理学思想在南宋日益获得官方认可，其著作逐渐成为科举考试的核心教材。理学将儒学与形而上学相结合，深刻影响了此后数百年东亚的思想和政治秩序。
description.en: Zhu Xi's Neo-Confucian philosophy gained increasing official recognition in the Southern Song. His works gradually became the core curriculum for civil service examinations, profoundly shaping East Asian thought and political order for centuries.

description.zh: 古尔王朝的穆罕默德·古尔及其将领库特布丁·艾巴克持续扩张在北印度的控制，攻占多个拉杰普特王国的领地。这为此后德里苏丹国的建立奠定了基础。
description.en: Muhammad of Ghur and his general Qutb al-Din Aibak continued expanding Ghurid control in northern India, conquering territories of multiple Rajput kingdoms. This laid the foundation for the later establishment of the Delhi Sultanate.

description.zh: 古尔王朝统治者穆罕默德·古尔遇刺后，其奴隶将军库特布丁·艾巴克在德里自立为苏丹，建立了奴隶王朝（马穆鲁克王朝）。德里苏丹国成为南亚次大陆首个持久的穆斯林政权。
description.en: After the assassination of the Ghurid ruler Muhammad of Ghur, his slave-general Qutb al-Din Aibak proclaimed himself Sultan at Delhi, founding the Slave Dynasty (Mamluk Dynasty). The Delhi Sultanate became the first enduring Muslim polity on the Indian subcontinent.

description.zh: 高棉帝国在阇耶跋摩七世统治下达到极盛，修建了吴哥城（大吴哥）和巴戎寺等宏伟建筑，并将佛教确立为国教。高棉的势力范围覆盖了现今东南亚大陆的大部分地区。
description.en: The Khmer Empire reached its zenith under Jayavarman VII, who built the magnificent Angkor Thom and Bayon Temple and established Buddhism as the state religion. Khmer influence extended across much of mainland Southeast Asia.

title.en: Battle of Las Navas de Tolosa

description.zh: 卡斯蒂利亚、阿拉贡和纳瓦拉联军在安达卢西亚大败穆瓦希德军队。这是伊比利亚半岛收复失地运动的关键转折点，穆斯林势力在半岛的统治从此不可逆转地衰落。
description.en: Combined forces of Castile, Aragon, and Navarre decisively defeated the Almohad army in Andalusia. This was the pivotal turning point of the Reconquista, after which Muslim power on the Iberian Peninsula entered irreversible decline.

description.zh: 威尼斯共和国凭借其庞大的商船队和遍布地中海的贸易站网络，牢牢掌控着东西方贸易的咽喉。香料、丝绸和奢侈品经威尼斯商人之手流入欧洲，为这座城邦积累了巨大财富。
description.en: The Republic of Venice, with its vast merchant fleet and network of trading posts across the Mediterranean, maintained firm control over East-West trade routes. Spices, silk, and luxury goods flowed into Europe through Venetian merchants, accumulating enormous wealth for the city-state.

title.zh: 阿尤布王朝控制埃及和叙利亚
title.en: Ayyubid Dynasty Controls Egypt and Syria

description.zh: 萨拉丁建立的阿尤布王朝在其去世后由其继承者继续统治，控制着从埃及到叙利亚的广大地区。王朝在与十字军的长期对峙中保持了伊斯兰世界的核心防线。
description.en: The Ayyubid dynasty founded by Saladin continued under his successors, controlling vast territories from Egypt to Syria. The dynasty maintained the core defense line of the Islamic world in its prolonged confrontation with the Crusaders.

title.en: Jin-Song Confrontation Along the Huai River

description.zh: 南宋与金朝沿淮河一线长期对峙，双方维持着脆弱的和平。南宋依托水军优势和江淮防线抵御金军南下，同时通过榷场进行边境贸易。
description.en: The Southern Song and Jin dynasties maintained a prolonged confrontation along the Huai River, sustaining a fragile peace. The Southern Song relied on naval superiority and the Jianghuai defense line to resist Jin advances while conducting border trade through regulated markets.

title.en: Mongol Campaigns Against Jin Northern Frontier

description.zh: 成吉思汗开始对金朝发动大规模军事行动，蒙古骑兵突破长城防线，攻入金朝北方领土。金朝被迫将军事重心从淮河前线转向北方防御。
description.en: Genghis Khan launched large-scale military campaigns against the Jin dynasty. Mongol cavalry breached the Great Wall defenses and invaded Jin's northern territories, forcing the Jin to shift their military focus from the Huai River front to northern defense.

description.zh: 巴黎大学、博洛尼亚大学和牛津大学在这一时期蓬勃发展，经院哲学成为欧洲知识界的主流思潮。亚里士多德的著作经阿拉伯学者译介传入欧洲，引发了一场深刻的思想革命。
description.en: The Universities of Paris, Bologna, and Oxford flourished during this period, with Scholasticism becoming the dominant intellectual movement in Europe. Aristotle's works, translated through Arab scholars, entered Europe and triggered a profound intellectual revolution.

description.zh: 朱罗王朝继续维持其在印度洋上的海上霸权，与东南亚的三佛齐和中国的宋朝保持着活跃的贸易联系。朱罗的海军力量使其成为印度洋贸易网络中的关键节点。
description.en: The Chola dynasty continued to maintain its maritime supremacy in the Indian Ocean, sustaining active trade links with Srivijaya in Southeast Asia and the Song dynasty in China. Chola naval power made it a key node in the Indian Ocean trade network.

description.zh: 大津巴布韦作为南部非洲最重要的城邦国家持续发展，其巨石建筑群规模不断扩大。大津巴布韦控制着金矿和象牙贸易，通过斯瓦希里海岸与印度洋贸易网络相连。
description.en: Great Zimbabwe continued to develop as the most important city-state in Southern Africa, with its massive stone architecture complex expanding in scale. It controlled gold and ivory trade, connected to the Indian Ocean trade network through the Swahili coast.

description.zh: 在教皇霍诺留三世的号召下，匈牙利国王安德拉斯二世率先出发，随后奥地利公爵利奥波德六世等欧洲贵族加入，十字军将进攻目标定为埃及的达米埃塔，试图通过控制尼罗河三角洲来夺回耶路撒冷。
description.en: At the call of Pope Honorius III, King Andrew II of Hungary set out first, followed by Duke Leopold VI of Austria and other European nobles. The Crusaders targeted Damietta in Egypt, attempting to recapture Jerusalem by controlling the Nile Delta.

title.zh: 蒲甘王朝的佛教建筑高峰

description.zh: 蒲甘王朝在缅甸中部大规模修建佛塔和寺院，形成了蔚为壮观的蒲甘佛塔群。上座部佛教在蒲甘王朝的推动下深深扎根于缅甸社会。
description.en: The Pagan dynasty undertook massive construction of pagodas and temples in central Burma, creating the spectacular Pagan temple complex. Theravada Buddhism took deep root in Burmese society under Pagan royal patronage.

description.zh: 法兰西国王腓力二世在布汶战役中决定性地击败了英格兰国王约翰与神圣罗马帝国皇帝奥托四世的联军。此战奠定了法兰西王权的崛起，同时削弱了英格兰和帝国的权威。
description.en: King Philip II of France decisively defeated the combined forces of English King John and Holy Roman Emperor Otto IV at the Battle of Bouvines. This battle cemented the rise of French royal power while weakening English and Imperial authority.
